hi.title: Strategy аӨ•аӨҫ Bitcoin аӨҮаӨӮаӨңаӨЁ STRC аӨ•аҘҖ 28 аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬ аӨЎаҘүаӨІаӨ° аӨёаҘҖаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҖаӨ¬
hi.excerpt: Strategy STRC аӨ¶аҘҮаӨҜаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҖ 28 аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬ аӨЎаҘүаӨІаӨ° аӨңаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаҘҖаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҖаӨ¬ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨңаӨ¬аӨ•аӨҝ Delphi Digital аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аӨ№аӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҚаӨҜ аӨӘаҘӮаӨӮаӨңаҘҖ аӨңаҘҒаӨҹаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨ§аӨЁ BTC аӨёаӨӮаӨҡаӨҜ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨ№аӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ
hi.body: Strategy аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҮ STRC аӨ¶аҘҮаӨҜаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҖ 28 аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬ аӨЎаҘүаӨІаӨ° аӨңаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ•аӨ°аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаҘҖаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҖаӨ¬ аӨӘаӨ№аҘҒаӨӮаӨҡ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨңаҘӢ аӨүаӨёаӨ•аҘҖ Bitcoin аӨёаӨӮаӨҡаӨҜ аӨ°аӨЈаӨЁаҘҖаӨӨаӨҝ аӨёаҘҮ аӨңаҘҒаӨЎаӨјаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ• аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ®аҘҒаӨ– аӨ«аӨӮаӨЎаӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨҡаҘҲаӨЁаӨІ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ Delphi Digital аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¶аҘӢаӨ§аӨ•аӨ°аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫаӨ“аӨӮ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аӨ№аӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨёаҘҖаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ•аӨӮаӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ Bitcoin аӨҮаӨӮаӨңаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ…аӨ№аӨ® аӨ¬аӨҫаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ¬аӨЁ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨӯаҘҖ аӨүаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аҘӢаӨӮаӨЁаҘҮ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ¬аӨӨаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝ STRC аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨІаӨҫаӨөаӨҫ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҚаӨҜ аӨӘаҘӮаӨӮаӨңаҘҖ аӨңаҘҒаӨҹаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӨаӨӮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨүаӨӘаӨІаӨ¬аҘҚаӨ§ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨңаҘӢ аӨ•аӨӮаӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ BTC аӨ–аӨ°аҘҖаӨҰ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҶаӨ—аҘҮ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨёаӨ№аӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨҰаҘҮ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨ®аҘҒаӨ–аҘҚаӨҜ аӨҶаӨӮаӨ•аӨЎаӨјаӨҫ STRC аӨ•аҘҖ 28 аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬ аӨЎаҘүаӨІаӨ° аӨёаҘҖаӨ®аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨ”аӨ° аӨ¬аӨҫаӨңаӨҫаӨ° аӨҜаӨ№ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ– аӨ°аӨ№аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨҮаӨё аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨӘаӨ№аҘҒаӨӮаӨҡаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҰ Strategy аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ Bitcoin аӨ–аӨ°аҘҖаӨҰ аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨ®аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҸ аӨ°аӨ–аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨёаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨӨ: cointelegraph.com

id.title: Mesin Bitcoin Strategy Dekati Batas STRC US$28 Miliar
id.excerpt: Strategy mendekati batas penerbitan saham STRC senilai US$28 miliar, sementara Delphi Digital menilai mekanisme pendanaan lain masih dapat menopang akumulasi BTC.
id.body: Strategy mendekati batas penerbitan US$28 miliar untuk saham STRC, salah satu jalur pendanaan penting bagi strategi akumulasi Bitcoin perusahaan. Peneliti Delphi Digital menyebut batas tersebut dapat menjadi kendala penting bagi mesin Bitcoin Strategy. Namun, mereka juga mencatat bahwa mekanisme penggalangan modal lain masih dapat digunakan dan berpotensi terus mendukung pembelian BTC perusahaan. Angka utama yang menjadi perhatian adalah batas STRC US$28 miliar, sementara pasar menyoroti bagaimana Strategy akan mempertahankan kapasitas pembelian Bitcoin setelah mencapai ambang tersebut. Sumber: cointelegraph.com

ko.title: л№„нҠёмҪ”мқё, 8л§Ң5000лӢ¬лҹ¬ лҸҢнҢҢ н•өмӢ¬ м§Җм§Җм„  мң м§ҖвҖҰS&P500 мӮ¬мғҒ мөңкі к°Җ кІҪмӢ
ko.excerpt: л№„нҠёмҪ”мқёмқҖ мқён”Ңл Ҳмқҙм…ҳл°ң н•ҳлқҪ мқҙнӣ„ нҡҢліөм„ём—җ л“Өм–ҙм„°кі , S&P500мқҖ кұ°мӢң м§Җн‘ң л¶ҖлӢҙмқ„ л–Ём№ҳл©° мӮ¬мғҒ мөңкі м№ҳлҘј кё°лЎқн–ҲлӢӨ. мӢңмһҘмқҳ мң„н—ҳ м„ нҳёк°Җ л№ лҘҙкІҢ нҷ•лҢҖлҗҗлӢӨ.
ko.body: л№„нҠёмҪ”мқёмқҙ мқён”Ңл Ҳмқҙм…ҳмңјлЎң мҙүл°ңлҗң мҶҗмӢӨ мқҙнӣ„ нҡҢліө көӯл©ҙм—җ л“Өм–ҙм„ңл©° 8л§Ң5000лӢ¬лҹ¬ лҸҢнҢҢлҘј мң„н•ң н•өмӢ¬ м§Җм§Җм„ мқ„ мң м§Җн•ҳкі  мһҲлӢӨ. к°ҷмқҖ мӢңкё° лҜёкөӯ мҰқмӢңлҠ” кұ°мӢңкІҪм ң м§Җн‘ңм—җ лҢҖн•ң л¶ҖлӢҙмқ„ н„ём–ҙлӮҙл©° S&P500мқҙ мғҲ мӮ¬мғҒ мөңкі м№ҳлҘј кё°лЎқн–ҲлӢӨ. мӣҗл¬ёмқҖ broader risk appetiteк°Җ вҖңskyrocketingвҖқн•ҳкі  мһҲлӢӨкі  м „н–ҲлӢӨ. мқҙлҠ” л№„нҠёмҪ”мқёкіј мЈјмӢқмӢңмһҘмқҙ лҸҷмӢңм—җ мң„н—ҳмһҗмӮ° м„ нҳё нҷ•лҢҖмқҳ мҳҒн–Ҙмқ„ л°ӣкі  мһҲмқҢмқ„ ліҙм—¬мӨҖлӢӨ. лӢӨл§Ң кё°мӮ¬м—җм„ң м ңмӢңлҗң н•өмӢ¬мқҖ л№„нҠёмҪ”мқёмқҙ лҸҢнҢҢлҘј мң„н•ҙ м§Җм§Җм„  л°©м–ҙк°Җ н•„мҡ”н•ҳлӢӨлҠ” м җмқҙлӢӨ. м¶ңмІҳ: cointelegraph.com.

en.title: Bitcoin Holds Key Support for $85K Breakout as S&P 500 Hits Record High
en.excerpt: Bitcoin moved into recovery after inflation-driven losses, while the S&P 500 reached a new all-time high as U.S. stocks shook off macro data and risk appetite surged.
en.body: Bitcoin entered recovery mode after losses triggered by inflation and continued to hold the key support needed for a potential breakout toward $85,000. At the same time, U.S. stocks shrugged off macroeconomic data, with the S&P 500 setting a new all-time high. The original report said broader risk appetite was вҖңskyrocketing.вҖқ The move shows Bitcoin and equities both reflecting stronger demand for risk assets. However, the articleвҖҷs central point is that Bitcoin still needs to defend support to sustain the breakout setup. Source: cointelegraph.com.

es.title: Bitcoin mantiene soporte clave para romper 85.000 dГіlares mientras el S&P 500 marca rГ©cord
es.excerpt: Bitcoin entrГі en recuperaciГіn tras pГ©rdidas causadas por la inflaciГіn, mientras el S&P 500 alcanzГі un nuevo mГЎximo histГіrico al superar los datos macro y subir el apetito por riesgo.
es.body: Bitcoin entrГі en modo de recuperaciГіn despuГ©s de las pГ©rdidas provocadas por la inflaciГіn y mantuvo el soporte clave necesario para una posible ruptura hacia los 85.000 dГіlares. Al mismo tiempo, las acciones estadounidenses dejaron atrГЎs la presiГіn de los datos macroeconГіmicos y el S&P 500 marcГі un nuevo mГЎximo histГіrico. El informe original dijo que el apetito general por el riesgo estaba вҖңskyrocketingвҖқ. Esto muestra que Bitcoin y las acciones reflejan una mayor demanda de activos de riesgo. Aun asГӯ, el punto central es que Bitcoin debe defender el soporte para sostener el escenario de ruptura. Fuente: cointelegraph.com.

pt.title: Bitcoin mantГ©m suporte-chave para romper US$ 85 mil enquanto S&P 500 bate recorde
pt.excerpt: O Bitcoin entrou em recuperaГ§ГЈo apГіs perdas causadas pela inflaГ§ГЈo, enquanto o S&P 500 atingiu nova mГЎxima histГіrica ao superar dados macro e ver o apetite por risco crescer.
pt.body: O Bitcoin entrou em modo de recuperaГ§ГЈo depois das perdas provocadas pela inflaГ§ГЈo e continuou mantendo o suporte-chave necessГЎrio para uma possГӯvel ruptura rumo a US$ 85 mil. Ao mesmo tempo, as aГ§Гөes dos EUA deixaram de lado a pressГЈo dos dados macroeconГҙmicos, e o S&P 500 marcou uma nova mГЎxima histГіrica. O relatГіrio original afirmou que o apetite amplo por risco estava вҖңskyrocketingвҖқ. Isso mostra que Bitcoin e bolsas refletem maior demanda por ativos de risco. Ainda assim, o ponto central Г© que o Bitcoin precisa defender o suporte para sustentar a configuraГ§ГЈo de rompimento. Fonte: cointelegraph.com.

de.title: Bitcoin hГӨlt SchlГјsselsupport fГјr Ausbruch auf 85.000 Dollar, S&P 500 auf Rekordhoch
de.excerpt: Bitcoin ging nach inflationsbedingten Verlusten in die Erholung, wГӨhrend der S&P 500 trotz Makrodaten ein neues Allzeithoch erreichte und die Risikobereitschaft stark anzog.
de.body: Bitcoin ist nach inflationsbedingten Verlusten in den Erholungsmodus gewechselt und hГӨlt weiter den wichtigen Support, der fГјr einen mГ¶glichen Ausbruch in Richtung 85.000 Dollar nГ¶tig ist. Gleichzeitig schГјttelten US-Aktien die Belastung durch makroГ¶konomische Daten ab, und der S&P 500 erreichte ein neues Allzeithoch. Der Originalbericht schrieb, die breitere Risikobereitschaft sei вҖңskyrocketingвҖқ. Das zeigt, dass Bitcoin und Aktien gleichermaГҹen eine stГӨrkere Nachfrage nach Risikoanlagen widerspiegeln. Im Mittelpunkt steht jedoch, dass Bitcoin den Support verteidigen muss, um das Ausbruchsszenario zu stГјtzen. Quelle: cointelegraph.com.

fr.title: Bitcoin conserve son support clГ© vers 85 000 dollars, le S&P 500 atteint un record
fr.excerpt: Bitcoin est reparti en reprise aprГЁs des pertes liГ©es Г  lвҖҷinflation, tandis que le S&P 500 a inscrit un nouveau record en dГ©passant les donnГ©es macro et lвҖҷappГ©tit pour le risque.
fr.body: Bitcoin est entrГ© en phase de reprise aprГЁs des pertes provoquГ©es par lвҖҷinflation et conserve le support clГ© nГ©cessaire Г  une possible cassure vers 85 000 dollars. Dans le mГӘme temps, les actions amГ©ricaines ont dГ©passГ© la pression des donnГ©es macroГ©conomiques, et le S&P 500 a atteint un nouveau record historique. Le rapport original indique que lвҖҷappГ©tit global pour le risque Г©tait вҖңskyrocketingвҖқ. Cela montre que Bitcoin et les actions reflГЁtent tous deux une demande accrue pour les actifs risquГ©s. Toutefois, le point central reste que Bitcoin doit dГ©fendre ce support pour maintenir la configuration de cassure. Source : cointelegraph.com.

ar.title: ШЁЩҠШӘЩғЩҲЩҠЩҶ ШӘШӯШ§ЩҒШё Ш№Щ„Щү ШҜШ№Щ… ШӯШ§ШіЩ… Щ„Ш§Ш®ШӘШұШ§ЩӮ 85 ШЈЩ„ЩҒ ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш§Шұ Щ…Ш№ ШӘШіШ¬ЩҠЩ„ S&P 500 ЩӮЩ…Ш© ШӘШ§ШұЩҠШ®ЩҠШ©
ar.excerpt: ШҜШ®Щ„ШӘ ШЁЩҠШӘЩғЩҲЩҠЩҶ Щ…ШұШӯЩ„Ш© ШӘШ№Ш§ЩҒ ШЁШ№ШҜ Ш®ШіШ§ШҰШұ ШіШЁШЁШӘЩҮШ§ ШЁЩҠШ§ЩҶШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ¶Ш®Щ…ШҢ ШЁЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ ШӘШ¬Ш§ЩҮЩ„ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіЩҮЩ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ЩҠШұЩғЩҠШ© Ш¶ШәЩҲШ· Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШ§ЩҶШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩғЩ„ЩҠШ© ЩҲШіШ¬Щ„ S&P 500 Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү ШӘШ§ШұЩҠШ®ЩҠШ§ Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜШ§ Щ…Ш№ ШөШ№ЩҲШҜ ШҙЩҮЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®Ш§Ш·ШұШ©.
ar.body: ШҜШ®Щ„ШӘ ШЁЩҠШӘЩғЩҲЩҠЩҶ Щ…ШұШӯЩ„Ш© ШӘШ№Ш§ЩҒ ШЁШ№ШҜ Ш®ШіШ§ШҰШұ ЩҶШ§Ш¬Щ…Ш© Ш№ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ¶Ш®Щ…ШҢ ЩҲЩҲШ§ШөЩ„ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӯЩҒШ§Шё Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„ШҜШ№Щ… Ш§Щ„ШӯШ§ШіЩ… Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШІЩ… Щ„Ш§ШӯШӘЩ…Ш§Щ„ Ш§Ш®ШӘШұШ§ЩӮ ЩҶШӯЩҲ 85 ШЈЩ„ЩҒ ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш§Шұ. ЩҲЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩӮШӘ ЩҶЩҒШіЩҮШҢ ШӘШ¬Ш§ЩҲШІШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіЩҮЩ… Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ЩҠШұЩғЩҠШ© Ш¶ШәШ· Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҠШ§ЩҶШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш§ЩӮШӘШөШ§ШҜЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩғЩ„ЩҠШ©ШҢ Щ„ЩҠШіШ¬Щ„ Щ…ШӨШҙШұ S&P 500 ЩӮЩ…Ш© ШӘШ§ШұЩҠШ®ЩҠШ© Ш¬ШҜЩҠШҜШ©. ЩҲШ°ЩғШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩ„ЩҠ ШЈЩҶ ШҙЩҮЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®Ш§Ш·ШұШ© Ш§Щ„ШЈЩҲШіШ№ ЩғШ§ЩҶШӘ вҖңskyrocketingвҖқ. ЩҲЩҠШёЩҮШұ Ш°Щ„Щғ ШЈЩҶ ШЁЩҠШӘЩғЩҲЩҠЩҶ ЩҲШіЩҲЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіЩҮЩ… ЩҠШ№ЩғШіШ§ЩҶ ШІЩҠШ§ШҜШ© Ш§Щ„Ш·Щ„ШЁ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩҲЩ„ Ш№Ш§Щ„ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш®Ш§Ш·Шұ. ЩҲЩ…Ш№ Ш°Щ„ЩғШҢ ЩҒШҘЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩӮШ·Ш© Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ ЩҮЩҠ ШЈЩҶ ШЁЩҠШӘЩғЩҲЩҠЩҶ ШӘШӯШӘШ§Ш¬ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҒШ§Ш№ Ш№ЩҶ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ№Щ… Щ„Щ„ШӯЩҒШ§Шё Ш№Щ„Щү ШҘШ№ШҜШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„Ш§Ш®ШӘШұШ§ЩӮ. Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШҜШұ: cointelegraph.com.

hi.title: Bitcoin аӨЁаҘҮ 85 аӨ№аӨңаӨҫаӨ° аӨЎаҘүаӨІаӨ° аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аӨҶаӨүаӨҹ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ…аӨ№аӨ® аӨёаӨӘаҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨҘаӨҫаӨ®аӨҫ, S&P 500 аӨЁаӨҸ аӨ¶аӨҝаӨ–аӨ° аӨӘаӨ°
hi.excerpt: Bitcoin аӨ®аӨ№аӨӮаӨ—аӨҫаӨҲ аӨёаҘҮ аӨҶаӨҲ аӨ—аӨҝаӨ°аӨҫаӨөаӨҹ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҰ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аӨөаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ®аҘӢаӨЎ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҶаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨңаӨ¬аӨ•аӨҝ S&P 500 аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢ аӨЎаҘҮаӨҹаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҰаӨ¬аӨҫаӨө аӨқаӨҹаӨ•аӨ•аӨ° аӨЁаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаӨ°аҘҚаӨөаӨ•аӨҫаӨІаӨҝаӨ• аӨүаӨҡаҘҚаӨҡ аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨ° аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨңаҘӢаӨ–аӨҝаӨ® аӨІаҘҮаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҡаӨҫаӨ№ аӨӨаҘҮаӨң аӨ№аҘҒаӨҲаҘӨ
hi.body: Bitcoin аӨ®аӨ№аӨӮаӨ—аӨҫаӨҲ аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨӨ аӨЁаҘҒаӨ•аӨёаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҰ аӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аӨөаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ®аҘӢаӨЎ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҶаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° 85,000 аӨЎаҘүаӨІаӨ° аӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаӨӮаӨӯаӨҫаӨөаӨҝаӨӨ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аӨҶаӨүаӨҹ аӨҡаӨҫаӨІ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨңаӨ°аҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ…аӨ№аӨ® аӨёаӨӘаҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҸ аӨ°аӨ–аӨҫаҘӨ аӨҮаӨёаҘҖ аӨҰаҘҢаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁ аӨ…аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¶аҘҮаӨҜаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҲаӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨҮаӨ•аҘүаӨЁаӨ®аӨҝаӨ• аӨЎаҘҮаӨҹаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҰаӨ¬аӨҫаӨө аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаҘҖаӨӣаҘҮ аӨӣаҘӢаӨЎаӨјаӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° S&P 500 аӨЁаҘҮ аӨЁаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаӨ°аҘҚаӨөаӨ•аӨҫаӨІаӨҝаӨ• аӨүаӨҡаҘҚаӨҡ аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨ° аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨң аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаҘӨ аӨ®аҘӮаӨІ аӨ°аӨҝаӨӘаҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аӨ№аӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨөаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨӘаӨ• аӨңаҘӢаӨ–аӨҝаӨ® аӨІаҘҮаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӯаӨҫаӨөаӨЁаӨҫ вҖңskyrocketingвҖқ аӨҘаҘҖаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨҰаӨҝаӨ–аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ Bitcoin аӨ”аӨ° аӨ¶аҘҮаӨҜаӨ° аӨ¬аӨҫаӨңаӨҫаӨ° аӨҰаҘӢаӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨңаҘӢаӨ–аӨҝаӨ® аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨёаӨӮаӨӘаӨӨаҘҚаӨӨаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ— аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨ¶аӨҫ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨӯаҘҖ аӨ°аӨҝаӨӘаҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ®аҘҒаӨ–аҘҚаӨҜ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨӮаӨҰаҘҒ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аӨҶаӨүаӨҹ аӨёаҘҮаӨҹаӨ…аӨӘ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҸ аӨ°аӨ–аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ Bitcoin аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨӘаҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ¬аӨҡаӨҫаӨҸ аӨ°аӨ–аӨЁаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢаӨ—аӨҫаҘӨ аӨёаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨӨ: cointelegraph.com.

id.title: Bitcoin Tahan Support Kunci untuk Breakout US$85 Ribu saat S&P 500 Cetak Rekor
id.excerpt: Bitcoin memasuki fase pemulihan setelah penurunan akibat inflasi, sementara S&P 500 mencetak rekor tertinggi baru saat saham AS mengabaikan data makro dan minat risiko melonjak.
id.body: Bitcoin memasuki mode pemulihan setelah kerugian yang dipicu inflasi dan tetap mempertahankan support kunci yang dibutuhkan untuk potensi breakout menuju US$85.000. Pada saat yang sama, saham AS mengabaikan tekanan dari data makroekonomi, sementara S&P 500 mencetak rekor tertinggi baru. Laporan asli menyebut minat risiko yang lebih luas sedang вҖңskyrocketingвҖқ. Ini menunjukkan bahwa Bitcoin dan pasar saham sama-sama mencerminkan meningkatnya permintaan terhadap aset berisiko. Namun, poin utama artikel adalah Bitcoin masih perlu mempertahankan support agar setup breakout tetap berlaku. Sumber: cointelegraph.com.

ko.title: нҒ¬лҰҪнҶ  CLARITY Act, лҜё мғҒмӣҗ мҙҲлӢ№м Ғ м§Җм§Җ нҷ•ліҙ мӢӨнҢЁм—җ мҡ°л Ө
ko.excerpt: лҜёкөӯ мғҒмӣҗмқҳмӣҗл“ӨмқҖ мӢңмһҘкө¬мЎ° лІ•м•Ҳмқ„ лӢӨмқҢ лӢЁкі„лЎң л„ҳкё°кё° мң„н•ң мІӯл¬ёнҡҢм—җм„ң мһҘкё°к°„ нҳ‘мғҒм—җлҸ„ нҒ¬лҰҪнҶ  CLARITY Actмқҳ мҙҲлӢ№м Ғ кіөк°җлҢҖк°Җ м•„м§Ғ л¶ҖмЎұн•ҳлӢӨкі  л°қнҳ”лӢӨ.
ko.body: лҜёкөӯ мғҒмӣҗмқҳмӣҗл“ӨмқҖ нҒ¬лҰҪнҶ  мӢңмһҘкө¬мЎ° лІ•м•Ҳмқ„ лӢӨмқҢ лӢЁкі„лЎң м§„м „мӢңнӮӨкё° мң„н•ң мІӯл¬ёнҡҢм—җм„ң CLARITY Actк°Җ м•„м§Ғ мҙҲлӢ№м Ғ м§Җм§ҖлҘј нҷ•ліҙн•ҳм§Җ лӘ»н•ң м җм—җ мҡ°л ӨлҘј лӮҳнғҖлғҲлӢӨ. м—¬м•ј мқҳмӣҗл“ӨмқҖ кёҙ л…јмқҳк°Җ мқҙм–ҙмЎҢм§Җл§Ң н•„мҡ”н•ң кіөнҶөл¶„лӘЁм—җлҠ” лҸ„лӢ¬н•ҳм§Җ лӘ»н–ҲлӢӨкі  мқём •н–ҲлӢӨ. мқҙ лІ•м•ҲмқҖ л””м§Җн„ёмһҗмӮ° мӢңмһҘ кө¬мЎ°лҘј лӢӨлЈЁлҠ” н•өмӢ¬ л…јмқҳлЎң, лӢӨмқҢ м Ҳм°ЁлЎң лӮҳм•„к°Җл Өл©ҙ м–‘лӢ№ к°„ н•©мқҳк°Җ мӨ‘мҡ”н•ҳлӢӨ. мқҙлІҲ л°ңм–ёмқҖ лІ•м•Ҳ м¶”м§„ кіјм •мқҙ м—¬м „нһҲ мЎ°мңЁ лӢЁкі„м—җ мһҲмқҢмқ„ ліҙм—¬мӨҖлӢӨ. м¶ңмІҳ: coindesk.com

en.title: Crypto CLARITY Act Faces Senate Concern Over Bipartisan Support Gap
en.excerpt: U.S. senators said at a hearing to advance the market structure bill that lengthy talks still had not produced the bipartisan common ground needed for the crypto CLARITY Act.
en.body: U.S. senators voiced concern at a hearing aimed at moving the crypto market structure bill to its next stage, saying the CLARITY Act has not yet secured bipartisan support. Lawmakers from both parties acknowledged that lengthy discussions had taken place, but said the needed common ground had still not been reached. The bill is a key part of the digital asset market structure debate, and bipartisan agreement remains important for it to advance. The remarks show that the legislative process is still in a negotiation phase. Source: coindesk.com

es.title: Crypto CLARITY Act preocupa al Senado por falta de apoyo bipartidista
es.excerpt: Senadores de EE. UU. dijeron en una audiencia para avanzar el proyecto de estructura de mercado que las largas conversaciones aГәn no lograron el consenso bipartidista necesario para la CLARITY Act.
es.body: Senadores de Estados Unidos expresaron preocupaciГіn en una audiencia destinada a llevar el proyecto de ley de estructura del mercado cripto a su siguiente etapa, al seГұalar que la CLARITY Act aГәn no ha asegurado apoyo bipartidista. Legisladores de ambos partidos reconocieron que las conversaciones han sido extensas, pero que todavГӯa no se ha alcanzado el terreno comГәn necesario. El proyecto forma parte central del debate sobre la estructura del mercado de activos digitales, y el acuerdo entre partidos sigue siendo clave para avanzar. Las declaraciones muestran que el proceso legislativo continГәa en fase de negociaciГіn. Fuente: coindesk.com

pt.title: Crypto CLARITY Act preocupa Senado por falta de apoio bipartidГЎrio
pt.excerpt: Senadores dos EUA disseram em audiГӘncia para avanГ§ar o projeto de estrutura de mercado que longas negociaГ§Гөes ainda nГЈo criaram o consenso bipartidГЎrio necessГЎrio para a CLARITY Act.
pt.body: Senadores dos Estados Unidos demonstraram preocupaГ§ГЈo em uma audiГӘncia voltada a levar o projeto de lei de estrutura do mercado cripto Г  prГіxima etapa, afirmando que a CLARITY Act ainda nГЈo garantiu apoio bipartidГЎrio. Parlamentares dos dois partidos reconheceram que as conversas foram longas, mas que o terreno comum necessГЎrio ainda nГЈo foi alcanГ§ado. O projeto Г© parte central do debate sobre a estrutura do mercado de ativos digitais, e o acordo entre os partidos continua importante para avanГ§ar. As declaraГ§Гөes indicam que o processo legislativo segue em fase de negociaГ§ГЈo. Fonte: coindesk.com

de.title: Crypto CLARITY Act: US-Senat besorgt Гјber fehlende Parteieinigung
de.excerpt: US-Senatoren erklГӨrten bei einer AnhГ¶rung zum nГӨchsten Schritt fГјr das Marktstrukturgesetz, dass lange GesprГӨche noch keine nГ¶tige parteiГјbergreifende Basis fГјr den Crypto CLARITY Act geschaffen hГӨtten.
de.body: US-Senatoren ГӨuГҹerten bei einer AnhГ¶rung, die das Krypto-Marktstrukturgesetz in die nГӨchste Phase bringen sollte, Sorge darГјber, dass der CLARITY Act noch keine parteiГјbergreifende UnterstГјtzung gesichert hat. Abgeordnete beider Parteien rГӨumten ein, dass es lange GesprГӨche gegeben habe, die nГ¶tige gemeinsame Grundlage aber weiterhin fehle. Der Gesetzentwurf ist ein zentraler Teil der Debatte Гјber die Struktur des Marktes fГјr digitale VermГ¶genswerte, und eine Einigung zwischen den Parteien bleibt fГјr den weiteren Fortgang wichtig. Die Aussagen zeigen, dass das Gesetzgebungsverfahren weiterhin in der Abstimmung ist. Quelle: coindesk.com

fr.title: Crypto CLARITY Act: inquiГ©tude au SГ©nat faute dвҖҷappui bipartisan
fr.excerpt: Des sГ©nateurs amГ©ricains ont indiquГ© lors dвҖҷune audition visant Г  faire avancer le texte sur la structure de marchГ© que de longues discussions nвҖҷavaient pas encore crГ©Г© le consensus bipartisan requis.
fr.body: Des sГ©nateurs amГ©ricains ont exprimГ© leur inquiГ©tude lors dвҖҷune audition destinГ©e Г  faire passer le projet de loi sur la structure du marchГ© crypto Г  lвҖҷГ©tape suivante, en indiquant que le CLARITY Act nвҖҷa pas encore obtenu de soutien bipartisan. Des Г©lus des deux partis ont reconnu que les discussions avaient Г©tГ© longues, mais que le terrain dвҖҷentente nГ©cessaire nвҖҷavait toujours pas Г©tГ© trouvГ©. Ce texte occupe une place centrale dans le dГ©bat sur la structure du marchГ© des actifs numГ©riques, et un accord entre partis reste important pour avancer. Ces dГ©clarations montrent que le processus lГ©gislatif demeure en phase de nГ©gociation. Source: coindesk.com

ar.title: ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ CLARITY Щ„Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙЩҒШұШ© ЩҠЩҲШ§Ш¬ЩҮ ЩӮЩ„ЩӮШ§ ШЁШіШЁШЁ ШәЩҠШ§ШЁ ШҜШ№Щ… Ш§Щ„ШӯШІШЁЩҠЩҶ
ar.excerpt: ЩӮШ§Щ„ ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Щ„Ші Ш§Щ„ШҙЩҠЩҲШ® Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ЩҠШұЩғЩҠ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш¬Щ„ШіШ© Щ„ШҜЩҒШ№ Щ…ШҙШұЩҲШ№ ЩҮЩҠЩғЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҲЩӮ ШҘЩ„Щү Щ…ШұШӯЩ„ШӘЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§Щ„ЩҠШ© ШҘЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШ§ШҜШ«Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш·ЩҲЩҠЩ„Ш© Щ„Щ… ШӘШӯЩӮЩӮ ШЁШ№ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШӯШІШЁЩҠ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш·Щ„ЩҲШЁ Щ„ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ CLARITY Щ„Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙЩҒШұШ©.
ar.body: ШЈШ№ШұШЁ ШЈШ№Ш¶Ш§ШЎ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Щ„Ші Ш§Щ„ШҙЩҠЩҲШ® Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ЩҠШұЩғЩҠ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш¬Щ„ШіШ© ШӘЩҮШҜЩҒ ШҘЩ„Щү ШҜЩҒШ№ Щ…ШҙШұЩҲШ№ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҮЩҠЩғЩ„ ШіЩҲЩӮ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙЩҒШұШ© ШҘЩ„Щү Щ…ШұШӯЩ„ШӘЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§Щ„ЩҠШ© Ш№ЩҶ ЩӮЩ„ЩӮЩҮЩ… Щ…ЩҶ ШЈЩҶ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ CLARITY Щ„Щ… ЩҠШӯШөЩ„ ШЁШ№ШҜ Ш№Щ„Щү ШҜШ№Щ… Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШІШЁЩҠЩҶ. ЩҲШЈЩӮШұ Щ…ШҙШұШ№ЩҲЩҶ Щ…ЩҶ ЩғЩ„Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШӯШІШЁЩҠЩҶ ШЁШЈЩҶ Щ…ШӯШ§ШҜШ«Ш§ШӘ Ш·ЩҲЩҠЩ„Ш© Ш¬ШұШӘШҢ Щ„ЩғЩҶЩҮШ§ Щ„Щ… ШӘШөЩ„ ШЁШ№ШҜ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЈШұШ¶ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШӘШұЩғШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш·Щ„ЩҲШЁШ©. ЩҲЩҠШ№ШҜ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙШұЩҲШ№ Ш¬ШІШЎШ§ ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ§ Щ…ЩҶ ЩҶЩӮШ§Шҙ ЩҮЩҠЩғЩ„ ШіЩҲЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠШ©ШҢ ЩҲЩҠШёЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲШ§ЩҒЩӮ ШЁЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӯШІШЁЩҠЩҶ Щ…ЩҮЩ…Ш§ Щ„Щ„ШӘЩӮШҜЩ… ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎШ§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§Щ„ЩҠШ©. ЩҲШӘШёЩҮШұ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШӘШөШұЩҠШӯШ§ШӘ ШЈЩҶ Щ…ШіШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ШӘШҙШұЩҠШ№ Щ„Ш§ ЩҠШІШ§Щ„ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…ШұШӯЩ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҶШіЩҠЩӮ. Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШҜШұ: coindesk.com

hi.title: аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹаҘӢ CLARITY Act аӨӘаӨ° аӨ…аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаҘҖаӨЁаҘҮаӨҹ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҰаҘҚаӨөаӨҝаӨҰаӨІаҘҖаӨҜ аӨёаӨ®аӨ°аҘҚаӨҘаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аӨ®аҘҖ

hi.body: аӨ…аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаҘҖаӨЁаҘҮаӨҹаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹаҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨңаӨҫаӨ° аӨёаӨӮаӨ°аӨҡаӨЁаӨҫ аӨөаӨҝаӨ§аҘҮаӨҜаӨ• аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ…аӨ—аӨІаҘҮ аӨҡаӨ°аӨЈ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҶаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ№аҘҒаӨҲ аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨөаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҡаӨҝаӨӮаӨӨаӨҫ аӨңаӨӨаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ•аӨҝ CLARITY Act аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ…аӨӯаҘҖ аӨҰаҘҚаӨөаӨҝаӨҰаӨІаҘҖаӨҜ аӨёаӨ®аӨ°аҘҚаӨҘаӨЁ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҰаҘӢаӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨҰаӨІаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨёаӨҫаӨӮаӨёаӨҰаҘӢаӨӮ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ®аӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨІаӨӮаӨ¬аҘҖ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӨаӨҡаҘҖаӨӨ аӨ№аҘҒаӨҲ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ аӨңаӨ°аҘӮаӨ°аҘҖ аӨёаӨҫаӨқаӨҫ аӨҶаӨ§аӨҫаӨ° аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨӨаӨ• аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨЁ аӨӘаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨөаӨҝаӨ§аҘҮаӨҜаӨ• аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨҸаӨёаҘҮаӨҹ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨңаӨҫаӨ° аӨёаӨӮаӨ°аӨҡаӨЁаӨҫ аӨӘаӨ° аӨҡаӨІ аӨ°аӨ№аҘҖ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ®аҘҒаӨ– аӨҡаӨ°аҘҚаӨҡаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ№аӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨёаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨ”аӨ° аӨҶаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨҰаҘӢаӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨҰаӨІаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аҘҖаӨҡ аӨёаӨ№аӨ®аӨӨаӨҝ аӨ®аӨ№аӨӨаҘҚаӨөаӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҚаӨЈ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҮаӨЁ аӨҹаӨҝаӨӘаҘҚаӨӘаӨЈаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аҘҮаӨӨ аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨөаӨҝаӨ§аӨҫаӨҜаҘҖ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ…аӨӯаҘҖ аӨӯаҘҖ аӨёаӨ®аӨЁаҘҚаӨөаӨҜ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҡаӨ°аӨЈ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨёаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨӨ: coindesk.com

id.title: Crypto CLARITY Act Disorot Senat AS karena Dukungan Bipartisan Lemah
id.excerpt: Senator AS mengatakan dalam sidang untuk memajukan RUU struktur pasar bahwa pembicaraan panjang belum menghasilkan titik temu bipartisan yang diperlukan bagi crypto CLARITY Act.
id.body: Para senator Amerika Serikat menyampaikan kekhawatiran dalam sidang yang bertujuan membawa RUU struktur pasar kripto ke tahap berikutnya, dengan menyatakan bahwa CLARITY Act belum memperoleh dukungan bipartisan. Legislator dari kedua partai mengakui bahwa pembicaraan panjang telah berlangsung, tetapi titik temu yang diperlukan belum tercapai. RUU ini menjadi bagian penting dari pembahasan struktur pasar aset digital, dan kesepakatan antarpartai tetap penting agar proses dapat maju. Pernyataan tersebut menunjukkan bahwa proses legislasi masih berada dalam tahap koordinasi. Sumber: coindesk.com

ko.title: Oobit, мҪңлЎ¬л№„м•„лЎң м•”нҳёнҷ”нҸҗ кІ°м ң нҷ•лҢҖвҖҰмғқнҷң мҶҢл№„ кіөлһө
ko.excerpt: н…ҢлҚ”к°Җ м§Җмӣҗн•ҳлҠ” м•”нҳёнҷ”нҸҗ кІ°м ңмӮ¬ OobitмқҖ 2026л…„ 5мӣ” 14мқј мҪңлЎ¬л№„м•„м—җм„ң м„ңл№„мҠӨлҘј мӢңмһ‘н•ҳл©° лқјнӢҙм•„л©”лҰ¬м№ҙ мғқнҷң кІ°м ң мӢңмһҘ нҷ•лҢҖм—җ лӮҳм„°лӢӨ.
ko.body: н…ҢлҚ”к°Җ м§Җмӣҗн•ҳлҠ” м•”нҳёнҷ”нҸҗ кІ°м ңмӮ¬ OobitмқҖ 2026л…„ 5мӣ” 14мқј мҪңлЎ¬л№„м•„м—җм„ң м•”нҳёнҷ”нҸҗ кІ°м ң н”Ңлһ«нҸјмқ„ м¶ңмӢңн•ҳл©° лқјнӢҙм•„л©”лҰ¬м№ҙ мӮ¬м—…мқ„ л„“нҳ”лӢӨ. нҡҢмӮ¬м—җ л”°лҘҙл©ҙ мҪңлЎ¬л№„м•„лҠ” м•„нҷү лІҲм§ё мҡҙмҳҒ мӢңмһҘмқҙл©°, лёҢлқјм§ҲВ·м•„лҘҙн—ЁнӢ°лӮҳВ·м№ л Ҳ м§„м¶ңм—җ мқҙмқҖ нҷ•мһҘмқҙлӢӨ. OobitмқҖ л№„мҲҳнғҒнҳ• кІ°м ң н”Ңлһ«нҸјмңјлЎң, мқҙмҡ©мһҗк°Җ м§Җк°‘мқҳ л””м§Җн„ё мһҗмӮ°мқ„ Visa м—°кі„ кІ°м ң мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқ„ нҶөн•ҙ 80к°ңкөӯ мқҙмғҒ 1м–ө5мІңл§Ң кіі мқҙмғҒмқҳ к°Җл§№м җм—җм„ң мӮ¬мҡ©н•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨкі  л°қнҳ”лӢӨ. лқјнӢҙм•„л©”лҰ¬м№ҙ мӢңмһҘм—җм„ңлҠ” мӢқлЈҢн’Ҳм җкіј мҠҲнҚјл§Ҳмј“ м§Җм¶ңмқҙ нҷңлҸҷмқҳ 35%лҘј м°Ём§Җн–Ҳкі , мқҢмӢқм җВ·мӢқн’Ҳм җВ·л°ұнҷ”м җмқҙ л’ӨлҘј мқҙм—ҲлӢӨ. лёҢлқјм§Ҳм—җм„ңлҠ” 2024л…„ 11мӣ” м¶ңмӢң мқҙнӣ„ нҷңлҸҷмқҙ 200% мқҙмғҒ мҰқк°Җн–Ҳмңјл©°, нҷңм„ұ мқҙмҡ©мһҗлҠ” мӣ”нҸүк·  м•Ҫ 400лӢ¬лҹ¬лҘј 20кұҙмқҳ кұ°лһҳм—җ мҚјлӢӨ. м¶ңмІҳ: cointelegraph.com

en.title: Oobit Expands Crypto Payments to Colombia, Targeting Daily Spending
en.excerpt: Tether-backed crypto payments firm Oobit launched in Colombia on May 14, 2026, expanding its Latin America push into everyday digital asset payments.
en.body: Tether-backed crypto payments company Oobit launched its crypto payments platform in Colombia on May 14, 2026, widening its operations in Latin America. The company said Colombia is its ninth live market, following expansion into Brazil, Argentina and Chile. Oobit describes its service as a non-custodial payments platform that lets users spend digital assets directly from their wallets through a Visa-linked payment system accepted by more than 150 million merchants in over 80 countries. Across its Latin American markets, grocery stores and supermarkets accounted for 35% of activity, followed by restaurants, food stores and department stores. In Brazil, activity has risen more than 200% since the November 2024 launch, with active users spending about $400 per month across 20 transactions. Source: cointelegraph.com

es.title: Oobit lleva pagos cripto a Colombia y apunta al gasto diario
es.excerpt: La firma de pagos cripto respaldada por Tether, Oobit, lanzГі su plataforma en Colombia el 14 de mayo de 2026 para ampliar pagos cotidianos en LatinoamГ©rica.
es.body: La empresa de pagos cripto respaldada por Tether, Oobit, lanzГі el 14 de mayo de 2026 su plataforma de pagos con criptomonedas en Colombia, ampliando sus operaciones en LatinoamГ©rica. SegГәn la compaГұГӯa, Colombia es su noveno mercado activo y sigue a su expansiГіn en Brasil, Argentina y Chile. Oobit opera una plataforma de pagos sin custodia que permite a los usuarios gastar activos digitales directamente desde sus billeteras mediante un sistema vinculado a Visa, aceptado por mГЎs de 150 millones de comercios en mГЎs de 80 paГӯses. En sus mercados latinoamericanos, las tiendas de comestibles y supermercados representaron el 35% de la actividad, seguidos por restaurantes, tiendas de alimentos y grandes almacenes. En Brasil, la actividad creciГі mГЎs del 200% desde noviembre de 2024, con usuarios activos gastando unos 400 dГіlares al mes en 20 transacciones. Fuente: cointelegraph.com

pt.title: Oobit expande pagamentos cripto Г  ColГҙmbia e mira consumo diГЎrio
pt.excerpt: A Oobit, empresa de pagamentos cripto apoiada pela Tether, lanГ§ou sua plataforma na ColГҙmbia em 14 de maio de 2026 para ampliar pagamentos diГЎrios na AmГ©rica Latina.
pt.body: A empresa de pagamentos cripto apoiada pela Tether, Oobit, lanГ§ou em 14 de maio de 2026 sua plataforma de pagamentos com criptomoedas na ColГҙmbia, ampliando sua atuaГ§ГЈo na AmГ©rica Latina. Segundo a companhia, a ColГҙmbia Г© seu nono mercado ativo, apГіs expansГөes para Brasil, Argentina e Chile. A Oobit opera uma plataforma de pagamentos sem custГіdia que permite aos usuГЎrios gastar ativos digitais diretamente de suas carteiras por meio de um sistema vinculado Г  Visa, aceito por mais de 150 milhГөes de comerciantes em mais de 80 paГӯses. Nos mercados latino-americanos, mercearias e supermercados responderam por 35% da atividade, seguidos por restaurantes, lojas de alimentos e lojas de departamento. No Brasil, a atividade cresceu mais de 200% desde novembro de 2024, com usuГЎrios ativos gastando cerca de US$ 400 por mГӘs em 20 transaГ§Гөes. Fonte: cointelegraph.com

de.title: Oobit startet Krypto-Zahlungen in Kolumbien fГјr AlltagskГӨufe
de.excerpt: Das von Tether unterstГјtzte Krypto-Zahlungsunternehmen Oobit startete am 14. Mai 2026 in Kolumbien und baut damit Alltagszahlungen in Lateinamerika aus.
de.body: Das von Tether unterstГјtzte Krypto-Zahlungsunternehmen Oobit hat am 14. Mai 2026 seine Krypto-Zahlungsplattform in Kolumbien gestartet und damit seine AktivitГӨten in Lateinamerika ausgeweitet. Nach Angaben des Unternehmens ist Kolumbien der neunte aktive Markt, nach Expansionen nach Brasilien, Argentinien und Chile. Oobit betreibt eine nicht verwahrende Zahlungsplattform, mit der Nutzer digitale VermГ¶genswerte direkt aus ihren Wallets Гјber ein Visa-gebundenes Zahlungssystem ausgeben kГ¶nnen, das bei mehr als 150 Millionen HГӨndlern in Гјber 80 LГӨndern akzeptiert wird. In den lateinamerikanischen MГӨrkten entfielen 35% der AktivitГӨt auf LebensmittelgeschГӨfte und SupermГӨrkte, gefolgt von Restaurants, LebensmittelgeschГӨften und KaufhГӨusern. In Brasilien stieg die AktivitГӨt seit dem Start im November 2024 um mehr als 200%; aktive Nutzer gaben im Schnitt rund 400 US-Dollar pro Monat in 20 Transaktionen aus. Quelle: cointelegraph.com

fr.title: Oobit Г©tend les paiements crypto en Colombie pour les achats quotidiens
fr.excerpt: Oobit, sociГ©tГ© de paiements crypto soutenue par Tether, a lancГ© sa plateforme en Colombie le 14 mai 2026 afin dвҖҷГ©largir les paiements du quotidien en AmГ©rique latine.
fr.body: Oobit, sociГ©tГ© de paiements crypto soutenue par Tether, a lancГ© le 14 mai 2026 sa plateforme de paiements en cryptomonnaies en Colombie, Г©largissant ses activitГ©s en AmГ©rique latine. Selon lвҖҷentreprise, la Colombie est son neuviГЁme marchГ© actif, aprГЁs le BrГ©sil, lвҖҷArgentine et le Chili. Oobit exploite une plateforme de paiement non dГ©positaire qui permet aux utilisateurs de dГ©penser des actifs numГ©riques directement depuis leurs portefeuilles via un systГЁme liГ© Г  Visa, acceptГ© par plus de 150 millions de commerГ§ants dans plus de 80 pays. Sur ses marchГ©s latino-amГ©ricains, les Г©piceries et supermarchГ©s ont reprГ©sentГ© 35% de lвҖҷactivitГ©, devant les restaurants, magasins alimentaires et grands magasins. Au BrГ©sil, lвҖҷactivitГ© a augmentГ© de plus de 200% depuis le lancement de novembre 2024, les utilisateurs actifs dГ©pensant environ 400 dollars par mois en 20 transactions. Source: cointelegraph.com

ar.title: Oobit ШӘЩҲШіШ№ Щ…ШҜЩҒЩҲШ№Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙЩҒШұШ© ШҘЩ„Щү ЩғЩҲЩ„ЩҲЩ…ШЁЩҠШ§ Щ„Щ„ШҘЩҶЩҒШ§ЩӮ Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ…ЩҠ
ar.excerpt: ШЈШ·Щ„ЩӮШӘ Oobit Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜШ№ЩҲЩ…Ш© Щ…ЩҶ Tether Щ…ЩҶШөШӘЩҮШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ЩғЩҲЩ„ЩҲЩ…ШЁЩҠШ§ ЩҒЩҠ 14 Щ…Ш§ЩҠЩҲ 2026ШҢ Щ…ЩҲШіШ№Ш© ШӯШ¶ЩҲШұЩҮШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ШЈЩ…ЩҠШұЩғШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠЩҶЩҠШ© ЩҶШӯЩҲ Щ…ШҜЩҒЩҲШ№Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩ…ЩҠШ©.
ar.body: ШЈШ·Щ„ЩӮШӘ ШҙШұЩғШ© Щ…ШҜЩҒЩҲШ№Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙЩҒШұШ© OobitШҢ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜШ№ЩҲЩ…Ш© Щ…ЩҶ TetherШҢ Щ…ЩҶШөШ© Ш§Щ„ШҜЩҒШ№ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҙЩҒШұШ© ЩҒЩҠ ЩғЩҲЩ„ЩҲЩ…ШЁЩҠШ§ ЩҒЩҠ 14 Щ…Ш§ЩҠЩҲ 2026ШҢ Щ„ШӘЩҲШіЩҠШ№ Ш№Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ§ШӘЩҮШ§ ЩҒЩҠ ШЈЩ…ЩҠШұЩғШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠЩҶЩҠШ©. ЩҲЩӮШ§Щ„ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШҙШұЩғШ© ШҘЩҶ ЩғЩҲЩ„ЩҲЩ…ШЁЩҠШ§ ЩҮЩҠ ШіЩҲЩӮЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШҙШ· Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§ШіШ№ШҢ ШЁШ№ШҜ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҲШіШ№ ШҘЩ„Щү Ш§Щ„ШЁШұШ§ШІЩҠЩ„ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЈШұШ¬ЩҶШӘЩҠЩҶ ЩҲШӘШҙЩҠЩ„ЩҠ. ЩҲШӘШ№Щ…Щ„ Oobit ЩғЩ…ЩҶШөШ© ШҜЩҒШ№ ШәЩҠШұ ШӯШ§ЩҒШёШ© ШӘШӘЩҠШӯ Щ„Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…ЩҠЩҶ ШҘЩҶЩҒШ§ЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠШ© Щ…ШЁШ§ШҙШұШ© Щ…ЩҶ Щ…ШӯШ§ЩҒШёЩҮЩ… Ш№ШЁШұ ЩҶШёШ§Щ… ШҜЩҒШ№ Щ…ШұШӘШЁШ· ШЁЩҒЩҠШІШ§ШҢ Щ…ЩӮШЁЩҲЩ„ Щ„ШҜЩү ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Щ…ЩҶ 150 Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ ШӘШ§Ш¬Шұ ЩҒЩҠ ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Щ…ЩҶ 80 ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш©. ЩҲЩҒЩҠ ШЈШіЩҲШ§ЩӮЩҮШ§ ШЁШЈЩ…ЩҠШұЩғШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш§ШӘЩҠЩҶЩҠШ©ШҢ ШҙЩғЩ„ШӘ Щ…ШӘШ§Ш¬Шұ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩӮШ§Щ„Ш© ЩҲШ§Щ„ШіЩҲШЁШұЩ…Ш§ШұЩғШӘ 35% Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШҙШ§Ш·ШҢ ШӘЩ„ШӘЩҮШ§ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш·Ш§Ш№Щ… ЩҲЩ…ШӘШ§Ш¬Шұ Ш§Щ„Ш·Ш№Ш§Щ… ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШӘШ§Ш¬Шұ Ш§Щ„ЩғШЁШұЩү. ЩҲЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁШұШ§ШІЩҠЩ„ШҢ ШІШ§ШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШҙШ§Ш· ШЁШЈЩғШ«Шұ Щ…ЩҶ 200% Щ…ЩҶШ° Ш§Щ„ШҘШ·Щ„Ш§ЩӮ ЩҒЩҠ ЩҶЩҲЩҒЩ…ШЁШұ 2024ШҢ Щ…Ш№ ШҘЩҶЩҒШ§ЩӮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…ЩҠЩҶ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШҙШ·ЩҠЩҶ ЩҶШӯЩҲ 400 ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш§Шұ ШҙЩҮШұЩҠШ§ Ш№ШЁШұ 20 Щ…Ш№Ш§Щ…Щ„Ш©. Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШҜШұ: cointelegraph.com

hi.title: Oobit аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘӢаӨІаӨӮаӨ¬аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹаҘӢ аӨӯаҘҒаӨ—аӨӨаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаӨҫаӨҸ, аӨ°аҘӢаӨңаӨ®аӨ°аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫ аӨ–аӨ°аҘҚаӨҡ аӨӘаӨ° аӨңаҘӢаӨ°
hi.excerpt: Tether аӨёаӨ®аӨ°аҘҚаӨҘаӨҝаӨӨ аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹаҘӢ аӨӯаҘҒаӨ—аӨӨаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ•аӨӮаӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ Oobit аӨЁаҘҮ 14 аӨ®аӨҲ 2026 аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘӢаӨІаӨӮаӨ¬аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨІаҘҮаӨҹаӨ«аҘүаӨ°аҘҚаӨ® аӨІаҘүаӨЁаҘҚаӨҡ аӨ•аӨ° аӨІаҘҲаӨҹаӨҝаӨЁ аӨ…аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨҰаҘҲаӨЁаӨҝаӨ• аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨҸаӨёаҘҮаӨҹ аӨӯаҘҒаӨ—аӨӨаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨөаӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫаҘӨ
hi.body: Tether аӨёаӨ®аӨ°аҘҚаӨҘаӨҝаӨӨ аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹаҘӢ аӨӯаҘҒаӨ—аӨӨаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ•аӨӮаӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ Oobit аӨЁаҘҮ 14 аӨ®аӨҲ 2026 аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ•аҘӢаӨІаӨӮаӨ¬аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹаҘӢ аӨӯаҘҒаӨ—аӨӨаӨҫаӨЁ аӨӘаҘҚаӨІаҘҮаӨҹаӨ«аҘүаӨ°аҘҚаӨ® аӨІаҘүаӨЁаҘҚаӨҡ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨІаҘҲаӨҹаӨҝаӨЁ аӨ…аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҫаӨ°аҘӢаӨ¬аӨҫаӨ° аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫаҘӨ аӨ•аӨӮаӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҒаӨёаӨҫаӨ°, аӨ•аҘӢаӨІаӨӮаӨ¬аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨүаӨёаӨ•аӨҫ аӨЁаҘҢаӨөаӨҫаӨӮ аӨёаӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨңаӨҫаӨ° аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨңаҘӢ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨңаҘҖаӨІ, аӨ…аӨ°аҘҚаӨңаҘҮаӨӮаӨҹаҘҖаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҡаӨҝаӨІаҘҖ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨөаӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҰ аӨҶаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ Oobit аӨҸаӨ• аӨЁаҘүаӨЁ-аӨ•аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘӢаӨЎаӨҝаӨҜаӨІ аӨӯаҘҒаӨ—аӨӨаӨҫаӨЁ аӨӘаҘҚаӨІаҘҮаӨҹаӨ«аҘүаӨ°аҘҚаӨ® аӨҡаӨІаӨҫаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨңаӨҝаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨңаӨ°аӨҝаӨҸ аӨүаӨӘаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аӨ•аӨ°аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ…аӨӘаӨЁаҘҮ аӨөаҘүаӨІаҘҮаӨҹ аӨёаҘҮ аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨҸаӨёаҘҮаӨҹ аӨёаҘҖаӨ§аҘҮ Visa аӨёаҘҮ аӨңаҘҒаӨЎаӨјаҘҮ аӨӯаҘҒаӨ—аӨӨаӨҫаӨЁ аӨёаӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаӨ® аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨ® аӨёаҘҮ аӨ–аӨ°аҘҚаӨҡ аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨ•аӨӮаӨӘаӨЁаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҒаӨёаӨҫаӨ° аӨҜаӨ№ аӨёаӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаӨ® 80 аӨёаҘҮ аӨ…аӨ§аӨҝаӨ• аӨҰаҘҮаӨ¶аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ 15 аӨ•аӨ°аҘӢаӨЎаӨј аӨёаҘҮ аӨңаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨҰаӨҫ аӨөаҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨҜаӨ№аӨҫаӨӮ аӨёаҘҚаӨөаҘҖаӨ•аӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨІаҘҲаӨҹаӨҝаӨЁ аӨ…аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨңаӨҫаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ•аӨҝаӨ°аӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨҰаҘҒаӨ•аӨҫаӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаҘҒаӨӘаӨ°аӨ®аӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨ•аҘҮаӨҹ аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ—аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҝаӨ§аӨҝ аӨ•аӨҫ 35% аӨ№аӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨёаӨҫ аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҰ аӨ°аҘҮаӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨ°аӨҫаӨӮ, аӨ–аӨҫаӨҰаҘҚаӨҜ аӨҰаҘҒаӨ•аӨҫаӨЁаҘҮаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаӨҝаӨӘаӨҫаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ аӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘӢаӨ° аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮаҘӨ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨңаҘҖаӨІ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨЁаӨөаӨӮаӨ¬аӨ° 2024 аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаҘүаӨЁаҘҚаӨҡ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҰ аӨ—аӨӨаӨҝаӨөаӨҝаӨ§аӨҝ 200% аӨёаҘҮ аӨ…аӨ§аӨҝаӨ• аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаҘҖ, аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜ аӨүаӨӘаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аӨ•аӨ°аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫаӨ“аӨӮ аӨЁаҘҮ 20 аӨІаҘҮаӨЁаӨҰаҘҮаӨЁ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ”аӨёаӨӨаӨЁ аӨІаӨ—аӨӯаӨ— 400 аӨЎаҘүаӨІаӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝ аӨ®аӨҫаӨ№ аӨ–аӨ°аҘҚаӨҡ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҸаҘӨ аӨёаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨӨ: cointelegraph.com

id.title: Oobit Perluas Pembayaran Kripto ke Kolombia untuk Belanja Harian
id.excerpt: Perusahaan pembayaran kripto yang didukung Tether, Oobit, meluncur di Kolombia pada 14 Mei 2026 untuk memperluas pembayaran aset digital harian di Amerika Latin.
id.body: Perusahaan pembayaran kripto yang didukung Tether, Oobit, meluncurkan platform pembayaran kripto di Kolombia pada 14 Mei 2026, memperluas operasinya di Amerika Latin. Perusahaan mengatakan Kolombia menjadi pasar aktif kesembilannya, setelah ekspansi ke Brasil, Argentina, dan Chile. Oobit menjalankan platform pembayaran non-kustodial yang memungkinkan pengguna membelanjakan aset digital langsung dari dompet mereka melalui sistem pembayaran terkait Visa, yang diterima oleh lebih dari 150 juta merchant di lebih dari 80 negara. Di pasar Amerika Latin, toko bahan makanan dan supermarket menyumbang 35% aktivitas, diikuti restoran, toko makanan, dan department store. Di Brasil, aktivitas naik lebih dari 200% sejak peluncuran November 2024, dengan pengguna aktif membelanjakan sekitar 400 dolar per bulan dalam 20 transaksi. Sumber: cointelegraph.com

ko.title: мҠӨн…Ңмқҙлё”мҪ”мқё, B2B көӯкІҪ к°„ кІ°м ңмҷҖ кё°м—… мһ¬л¬ҙ мқён”„лқјлЎң нҷ•мһҘ
ko.excerpt: мҪ”мқёлҚ°мҠӨнҒ¬лҠ” мҠӨн…Ңмқҙлё”мҪ”мқёмқҙ м•”нҳёнҷ”нҸҗ мҳҒм—ӯмқ„ л„ҳм–ҙ мӢӨл¬ј кёҲмңөмқҳ B2B көӯкІҪ к°„ кІ°м ңмҷҖ мһ¬л¬ҙ мқён”„лқјлЎң л¶ҖмғҒн•ҳкі  мһҲлӢӨкі  м „н–ҲлӢӨ.
ko.body: мҠӨн…Ңмқҙлё”мҪ”мқёмқҙ м•”нҳёнҷ”нҸҗ мӢңмһҘмқ„ л„ҳм–ҙ мӢӨл¬ј кёҲмңөмқҳ кІ°м ң мқён”„лқјлЎң нҷ•мһҘлҗҳкі  мһҲлӢӨ. coindesk.comм—җ л”°лҘҙл©ҙ мҠӨн…Ңмқҙлё”мҪ”мқёмқҖ кё°м—… к°„ көӯкІҪ к°„ кІ°м ңмҷҖ мһ¬л¬ҙ кҙҖлҰ¬м—җм„ң нҡЁмңЁм„ұ, мҶҚлҸ„, к·ңм ң мӨҖмҲҳ к°ҖлҠҘм„ұмқ„ мқҙмң лЎң мЈјлӘ©л°ӣкі  мһҲлӢӨ. кё°мЎҙ кёҲмңө мӢңмҠӨн…ңмқҳ ліҙмЎ° мҲҳлӢЁмқ„ л„ҳм–ҙ мғҲлЎңмҡҙ кІ°м ң л ҲмқјлЎң нҸүк°ҖлҗҳлҠ” нқҗлҰ„мқҙлӢӨ. нҠ№нһҲ B2B кұ°лһҳмҷҖ кё°м—… мһ¬л¬ҙ мҡҙмҳҒм—җм„ң л№ лҘё м •мӮ°кіј мҡҙмҳҒ нҡЁмңЁмқ„ мӣҗн•ҳлҠ” мҲҳмҡ”к°Җ мҠӨн…Ңмқҙлё”мҪ”мқё нҷңмҡ©мқ„ л’·л°ӣм№Ён•ңлӢӨ. н–Ҙнӣ„ мҠӨн…Ңмқҙлё”мҪ”мқёмқҖ м•”нҳёнҷ”нҸҗ лӮҙл¶Җ кұ°лһҳ мҲҳлӢЁмқ„ л„ҳм–ҙ кёҲмңөкё°кҙҖкіј кё°м—…мқҙ нҷңмҡ©н•ҳлҠ” кё°л°ҳ мқён”„лқјлЎң мһҗлҰ¬ мһЎмқ„ к°ҖлҠҘм„ұмқҙ м»Өм§Җкі  мһҲлӢӨ. м¶ңмІҳ: coindesk.com.

en.title: Stablecoins expand into B2B cross-border payments and treasury rails
en.excerpt: CoinDesk reported that stablecoins are moving beyond crypto into real-world finance as B2B cross-border payment and treasury infrastructure.
en.body: Stablecoins are expanding beyond the crypto market and into real-world financial payment infrastructure. According to coindesk.com, stablecoins are gaining attention in business-to-business cross-border payments and treasury management because of their efficiency, speed and potential for regulatory compliance. The trend positions them as new financial rails rather than only a supporting tool for existing systems. Demand for faster settlement and operational efficiency in B2B transactions and corporate treasury is supporting their use. Stablecoins may increasingly become core infrastructure used by financial institutions and companies, beyond their role as a crypto trading instrument. Source: coindesk.com.

es.title: Stablecoins avanzan en pagos B2B transfronterizos y tesorerГӯa
es.excerpt: CoinDesk informГі que las stablecoins salen del cripto y ganan espacio en finanzas reales como infraestructura de pagos B2B y tesorerГӯa.
es.body: Las stablecoins se estГЎn expandiendo mГЎs allГЎ del mercado cripto hacia la infraestructura de pagos de las finanzas reales. SegГәn coindesk.com, atraen atenciГіn en pagos transfronterizos entre empresas y gestiГіn de tesorerГӯa por su eficiencia, velocidad y capacidad de cumplir con marcos regulatorios. La tendencia las sitГәa como nuevos rieles financieros, no solo como apoyo de los sistemas existentes. En especial, la demanda de liquidaciГіn rГЎpida y eficiencia operativa en transacciones B2B y tesorerГӯa corporativa respalda su uso. A futuro, podrГӯan consolidarse como infraestructura bГЎsica para instituciones financieras y empresas, mГЎs allГЎ de su funciГіn dentro del comercio cripto. Fuente: coindesk.com.

pt.title: Stablecoins avanГ§am em pagamentos B2B internacionais e tesouraria
pt.excerpt: A CoinDesk informou que stablecoins saem do cripto e ganham espaГ§o nas finanГ§as reais como infraestrutura de pagamentos B2B e tesouraria.
pt.body: As stablecoins estГЈo se expandindo alГ©m do mercado cripto para a infraestrutura de pagamentos das finanГ§as reais. Segundo coindesk.com, elas ganham atenГ§ГЈo em pagamentos internacionais entre empresas e na gestГЈo de tesouraria por eficiГӘncia, velocidade e potencial de conformidade regulatГіria. A tendГӘncia as coloca como novos trilhos financeiros, nГЈo apenas como apoio aos sistemas existentes. Em especial, a demanda por liquidaГ§ГЈo rГЎpida e eficiГӘncia operacional em transaГ§Гөes B2B e tesouraria corporativa sustenta seu uso. No futuro, podem se firmar como infraestrutura bГЎsica para instituiГ§Гөes financeiras e empresas, alГ©m de seu papel em negociaГ§Гөes cripto. Fonte: coindesk.com.

de.title: Stablecoins wachsen zu B2B-Auslandszahlungen und Treasury-Schienen
de.excerpt: CoinDesk berichtete, dass Stablecoins Гјber Krypto hinaus in reale Finanzprozesse vordringen und B2B-Zahlungen sowie Treasury stГјtzen.
de.body: Stablecoins weiten sich Гјber den Kryptomarkt hinaus in die Zahlungsinfrastruktur der realen Finanzwelt aus. Laut coindesk.com gewinnen sie bei grenzГјberschreitenden Zahlungen zwischen Unternehmen und im Treasury-Management an Bedeutung, weil sie Effizienz, Geschwindigkeit und MГ¶glichkeiten zur regulatorischen Einhaltung bieten. Damit werden sie zunehmend als neue Finanzschienen gesehen, nicht nur als ErgГӨnzung bestehender Systeme. Besonders die Nachfrage nach schneller Abwicklung und operativer Effizienz in B2B-Transaktionen und Unternehmensfinanzen stГјtzt ihre Nutzung. KГјnftig kГ¶nnten Stablecoins Гјber ihre Rolle als Krypto-Handelsmittel hinaus zu Basisinfrastruktur fГјr Finanzinstitute und Unternehmen werden. Quelle: coindesk.com.

fr.title: Les stablecoins gagnent les paiements B2B transfrontaliers et la trГ©sorerie
fr.excerpt: CoinDesk indique que les stablecoins sortent de la crypto pour devenir une infrastructure de paiements B2B et de trГ©sorerie en finance rГ©elle.
fr.body: Les stablecoins sвҖҷГ©tendent au-delГ  du marchГ© crypto vers lвҖҷinfrastructure de paiement de la finance rГ©elle. Selon coindesk.com, ils attirent lвҖҷattention dans les paiements transfrontaliers entre entreprises et la gestion de trГ©sorerie grГўce Г  leur efficacitГ©, leur rapiditГ© et leur capacitГ© Г  sвҖҷinscrire dans un cadre rГ©glementaire. Cette Г©volution les prГ©sente comme de nouveaux rails financiers, et pas seulement comme un outil de soutien aux systГЁmes existants. La demande de rГЁglement rapide et dвҖҷefficacitГ© opГ©rationnelle dans les transactions B2B et la trГ©sorerie dвҖҷentreprise soutient leur usage. ГҖ lвҖҷavenir, ils pourraient devenir une infrastructure de base pour les institutions financiГЁres et les entreprises. Source: coindesk.com.

id.title: Stablecoin meluas ke pembayaran B2B lintas negara dan treasury
id.excerpt: CoinDesk melaporkan stablecoin bergerak melampaui kripto menjadi infrastruktur pembayaran B2B lintas negara dan treasury di keuangan nyata.
id.body: Stablecoin bergerak melampaui pasar kripto menuju infrastruktur pembayaran di keuangan nyata. Menurut coindesk.com, stablecoin mendapat perhatian dalam pembayaran lintas negara antarperusahaan dan manajemen treasury karena efisiensi, kecepatan, serta potensi kepatuhan regulasi. Tren ini menempatkannya sebagai rel keuangan baru, bukan sekadar alat pendukung sistem yang ada. Khususnya dalam transaksi B2B dan operasi treasury perusahaan, kebutuhan atas penyelesaian yang cepat dan efisiensi operasional mendukung penggunaannya. Ke depan, stablecoin dapat semakin menjadi infrastruktur dasar yang digunakan lembaga keuangan dan perusahaan, melampaui perannya sebagai alat transaksi di pasar kripto. Sumber: coindesk.com.

ko.title: нҒ¬лқјмј„, лё”лЎқмІҙмқё мһҗмӮ° лёҢлҰ¬м§Җм—җ мІҙмқёл§ҒнҒ¬ мұ„нғқ
ko.excerpt: нҒ¬лқјмј„мқҖ лё”лЎқмІҙмқё к°„ мһҗмӮ° лёҢлҰ¬м§Җ мқён”„лқјлҘј л Ҳмқҙм–ҙм ңлЎңм—җм„ң мІҙмқёл§ҒнҒ¬лЎң л°”кҫёл©°, мјҲн”„ кҙҖл Ё 2м–ө9200л§Ң лӢ¬лҹ¬ мқөмҠӨн”ҢлЎңмһҮ мқҙнӣ„ 30м–ө лӢ¬лҹ¬ мқҙмғҒ TVL мқҙм „мқ„ мҙүл°ңн–ҲлӢӨ.
ko.body: нҒ¬лқјмј„мқҖ лё”лЎқмІҙмқё к°„ мһҗмӮ° мқҙлҸҷмқ„ мң„н•ң лёҢлҰ¬м§Җ мқён”„лқјм—җм„ң л Ҳмқҙм–ҙм ңлЎңлҘј мІҙмқёл§ҒнҒ¬лЎң лҢҖмІҙн•ҳкё°лЎң н–ҲлӢӨ. мқҙлІҲ кІ°м •мқҖ мјҲн”„мҷҖ кҙҖл Ёлҗң л Ҳмқҙм–ҙм ңлЎң кё°л°ҳ лёҢлҰ¬м§Җм—җм„ң 2м–ө9200л§Ң лӢ¬лҹ¬ к·ңлӘЁ мқөмҠӨн”ҢлЎңмһҮмқҙ л°ңмғқн•ң л’Ө лӮҳмҷ”лӢӨ. мқҙм—җ л”°лқј мҙқ мҳҲм№ҳк°Җм№ҳ(TVL) 30м–ө лӢ¬лҹ¬ мқҙмғҒмқҙ мІҙмқёл§ҒнҒ¬ мӘҪмңјлЎң мқҙлҸҷн•ҳлҠ” нқҗлҰ„мқҙ лӮҳнғҖлӮ¬лӢӨ. мқҙлІҲ м „нҷҳмқҖ нҒ¬лЎңмҠӨмІҙмқё мһҗмӮ° м „мҶЎм—җм„ң ліҙм•Ҳкіј мқён”„лқј м„ нғқмқҙ н•өмӢ¬ мҹҒм җмңјлЎң л¶ҖмғҒн–ҲмқҢмқ„ ліҙм—¬мӨҖлӢӨ. м¶ңмІҳ: coindesk.com.

en.title: Kraken Picks Chainlink Over LayerZero for Asset Bridges
en.excerpt: Kraken is replacing LayerZero with Chainlink for cross-chain asset bridges, a move tied to more than $3 billion in TVL migration after a $292 million Kelp-related exploit.
en.body: Kraken will replace LayerZero with Chainlink for infrastructure used to bridge assets across blockchains. The decision follows a $292 million exploit involving a LayerZero-powered bridge connected to Kelp. As a result, more than $3 billion in total value locked is moving toward Chainlink-based infrastructure. The shift highlights how security and provider choice have become central issues for cross-chain asset transfers. Source: coindesk.com.

es.title: Kraken cambia LayerZero por Chainlink para puentes cripto
es.excerpt: Kraken sustituirГЎ LayerZero por Chainlink en sus puentes entre blockchains, tras un exploit de 292 millones de dГіlares vinculado a Kelp que mueve mГЎs de 3.000 millones en TVL.
es.body: Kraken reemplazarГЎ LayerZero por Chainlink como infraestructura para puentear activos entre blockchains. La decisiГіn llega despuГ©s de un exploit de 292 millones de dГіlares en un puente basado en LayerZero e involucrado con Kelp. Como resultado, mГЎs de 3.000 millones de dГіlares en valor total bloqueado (TVL) estГЎn migrando hacia infraestructura vinculada a Chainlink. El cambio subraya que la seguridad y la elecciГіn del proveedor son puntos clave para las transferencias de activos entre cadenas. Fuente: coindesk.com.

pt.title: Kraken troca LayerZero por Chainlink em pontes cripto
pt.excerpt: A Kraken substituirГЎ a LayerZero pela Chainlink em pontes entre blockchains, apГіs exploit de US$ 292 milhГөes ligado Г  Kelp que leva mais de US$ 3 bilhГөes em TVL a migrar.
pt.body: A Kraken vai substituir a LayerZero pela Chainlink na infraestrutura usada para fazer a ponte de ativos entre blockchains. A decisГЈo ocorre apГіs um exploit de US$ 292 milhГөes em uma ponte baseada na LayerZero envolvendo a Kelp. Com isso, mais de US$ 3 bilhГөes em valor total bloqueado (TVL) passam a migrar para infraestrutura ligada Г  Chainlink. A mudanГ§a mostra que seguranГ§a e escolha de provedor se tornaram questГөes centrais nas transferГӘncias de ativos entre cadeias. Fonte: coindesk.com.

de.title: Kraken ersetzt LayerZero durch Chainlink fГјr Krypto-Bridges
de.excerpt: Kraken stellt seine Cross-Chain-Bridges von LayerZero auf Chainlink um, nachdem ein Kelp-bezogener Exploit Гјber 292 Millionen Dollar mehr als 3 Milliarden Dollar TVL bewegt.
de.body: Kraken wird LayerZero durch Chainlink als Infrastruktur fГјr das Bridging von VermГ¶genswerten zwischen Blockchains ersetzen. Die Entscheidung folgt auf einen Exploit Гјber 292 Millionen Dollar bei einer LayerZero-gestГјtzten Bridge mit Bezug zu Kelp. Dadurch migrieren mehr als 3 Milliarden Dollar an Total Value Locked (TVL) in Richtung Chainlink-Infrastruktur. Der Schritt zeigt, dass Sicherheit und die Wahl des Infrastrukturproviders bei Cross-Chain-Transfers zu zentralen Themen geworden sind. Quelle: coindesk.com.

fr.excerpt: Kraken remplacera LayerZero par Chainlink pour les ponts entre blockchains, aprГЁs un exploit de 292 millions de dollars liГ© Г  Kelp entraГ®nant plus de 3 milliards de dollars de TVL.
fr.body: Kraken va remplacer LayerZero par Chainlink pour lвҖҷinfrastructure servant Г  transfГ©rer des actifs entre blockchains. Cette dГ©cision intervient aprГЁs un exploit de 292 millions de dollars sur un bridge propulsГ© par LayerZero et impliquant Kelp. Elle sвҖҷaccompagne dвҖҷune migration de plus de 3 milliards de dollars de valeur totale verrouillГ©e (TVL) vers lвҖҷinfrastructure Chainlink. Ce changement montre que la sГ©curitГ© et le choix du fournisseur sont devenus des enjeux majeurs pour les transferts cross-chain. Source: coindesk.com.

ar.title: ЩғШұШ§ЩғЩҶ ШӘШіШӘШЁШҜЩ„ LayerZero ШЁЩҖ Chainlink Щ„Ш¬ШіЩҲШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠШ©

ar.body: ЩӮШұШұШӘ ЩғШұШ§ЩғЩҶ Ш§ШіШӘШЁШҜШ§Щ„ LayerZero ШЁЩҖ Chainlink ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯШӘЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…Ш© Щ„Ш¬ШіШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩҲЩ„ ШЁЩҠЩҶ ШіЩ„Ш§ШіЩ„ Ш§Щ„ЩғШӘЩ„. ЩҲШ¬Ш§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШұШ§Шұ ШЁШ№ШҜ Ш§ШіШӘШәЩ„Ш§Щ„ ШЁЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш© 292 Щ…Щ„ЩҠЩҲЩҶ ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш§Шұ Ш·Ш§Щ„ Ш¬ШіШұШ§ Щ…ШҜШ№ЩҲЩ…Ш§ Щ…ЩҶ LayerZero ЩҲЩ…ШұШӘШЁШ·Ш§ ШЁЩҖ Kelp. ЩҲЩҶШӘЩҠШ¬Ш© Щ„Ш°Щ„ЩғШҢ ЩҠЩҶШӘЩӮЩ„ ШЈЩғШ«Шұ Щ…ЩҶ 3 Щ…Щ„ЩҠШ§ШұШ§ШӘ ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш§Шұ Щ…ЩҶ ШҘШ¬Щ…Ш§Щ„ЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩӮЩҠЩ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩӮЩҒЩ„Ш© TVL ЩҶШӯЩҲ ШЁЩҶЩҠШ© Chainlink. ЩҠШЁШұШІ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯЩҲЩ„ ШЈЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…Ш§ЩҶ ЩҲШ§Ш®ШӘЩҠШ§Шұ Щ…ШІЩҲШҜ Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШӯШӘЩҠШ© ШЈШөШЁШӯШ§ Щ…ШӯЩҲШұЩҠЩҶ ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠЩҠЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ ШӘШӯЩҲЩҠЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩҲЩ„ Ш№ШЁШұ Ш§Щ„ШіЩ„Ш§ШіЩ„. hi.body: Kraken аӨ¬аҘҚаӨІаҘүаӨ•аӨҡаҘҮаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аҘҖаӨҡ аӨҸаӨёаҘҮаӨҹ аӨІаҘҮ аӨңаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҖ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨң аӨҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ«аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨҡаӨ° аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ LayerZero аӨ•аҘҖ аӨңаӨ—аӨ№ Chainlink аӨ•аӨҫ аӨүаӨӘаӨҜаҘӢаӨ— аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨ—аӨҫаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ«аҘҲаӨёаӨІаӨҫ Kelp аӨёаҘҮ аӨңаҘҒаӨЎаӨјаҘҮ LayerZero-аӨёаӨӮаӨҡаӨҫаӨІаӨҝаӨӨ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨң аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ 292 аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨЁ аӨЎаҘүаӨІаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ exploit аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨҰ аӨҶаӨҜаӨҫаҘӨ аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨҡаӨІаӨӨаҘҮ 3 аӨ…аӨ°аӨ¬ аӨЎаҘүаӨІаӨ° аӨёаҘҮ аӨ…аӨ§аӨҝаӨ• аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ•аҘҒаӨІ аӨІаҘүаӨ•аҘҚаӨЎ аӨөаҘҲаӨІаҘҚаӨҜаҘӮ аӨҜаӨҫаӨЁаҘҖ TVL Chainlink аӨҶаӨ§аӨҫаӨ°аӨҝаӨӨ аӨҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ«аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨҡаӨ° аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ“аӨ° аӨ®аӨҫаӨҮаӨ—аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨҹ аӨ№аҘӢ аӨ°аӨ№аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІаӨҫаӨө аӨҰаӨҝаӨ–аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аҘүаӨё-аӨҡаҘҮаӨЁ аӨҸаӨёаҘҮаӨҹ аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨӮаӨёаӨ«аӨ° аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨёаҘҒаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҮаӨЁаҘҚаӨ«аҘҚаӨ°аӨҫаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨҡаӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫ аӨҡаҘҒаӨЁаӨҫаӨө аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ®аҘҒаӨ– аӨ®аҘҒаӨҰаҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ¬аӨЁ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨёаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨӨ: coindesk.com.

id.title: Kraken Ganti LayerZero dengan Chainlink untuk Bridge Aset
id.excerpt: Kraken akan mengganti LayerZero dengan Chainlink untuk bridge aset lintas blockchain, setelah exploit senilai US$292 juta terkait Kelp memicu migrasi TVL lebih dari US$3 miliar.
id.body: Kraken akan mengganti LayerZero dengan Chainlink sebagai infrastruktur untuk menjembatani aset antar-blockchain. Keputusan ini muncul setelah exploit senilai US$292 juta pada bridge berbasis LayerZero yang melibatkan Kelp. Dampaknya, lebih dari US$3 miliar total value locked (TVL) bergerak menuju infrastruktur berbasis Chainlink. Peralihan ini menunjukkan bahwa keamanan dan pilihan penyedia infrastruktur menjadi isu utama dalam transfer aset lintas rantai. Sumber: coindesk.com.

Clawvilleмқҳ мӢңлҸ„лҠ” мҳӨн”Ҳмӣ”л“ң MMORPGк°Җ кі м •лҗң мҪҳн…җмё лҘј л„ҳм–ҙ мқҙмҡ©мһҗмҷҖ AIк°Җ н•Ёк»ҳ ліҖнҷ”н•ҳлҠ” кіөк°„мңјлЎң нҷ•мһҘлҗ  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢмқ„ ліҙм—¬мӨҖлӢӨ. м¶ңмІҳ: cointelegraph.com.

en.title: Clawville Brings AI-Native Open-World MMORPG to Milady
en.excerpt: Clawville has unveiled the first AI-native open-world MMORPG in the Milady ecosystem, where AI agents and humans coexist, compete, collaborate, learn, earn, and evolve in real time.

The launch presents a gaming environment where AI agents and human users can coexist, compete, and collaborate in real time within one digital world. The original report says the universe is designed around shared learning, earning, and evolution. The context is a growing push to make AI-driven interaction a core part of gameplay. ClawvilleвҖҷs effort suggests open-world MMORPGs may expand beyond fixed content into spaces that change with both users and AI. Source: cointelegraph.com.

Die Vorstellung beschreibt eine Spielumgebung, in der KI-Agenten und menschliche Nutzer in einer gemeinsamen digitalen Welt in Echtzeit koexistieren, konkurrieren und zusammenarbeiten kГ¶nnen. Source: cointelegraph.com.

ar.title: Clawville ШӘШ·Щ„ЩӮ Щ„Ш№ШЁШ© MMORPG Щ…ЩҒШӘЩҲШӯШ© ШЈШөЩ„ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Ш°ЩғШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШөШ·ЩҶШ§Ш№ЩҠ ЩҒЩҠ Milady
ar.excerpt: ЩғШҙЩҒШӘ Clawville Ш№ЩҶ ШЈЩҲЩ„ Щ„Ш№ШЁШ© MMORPG ШЁШ№Ш§Щ„Щ… Щ…ЩҒШӘЩҲШӯ ШЈШөЩ„ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Ш°ЩғШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШөШ·ЩҶШ§Ш№ЩҠ ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ Щ…ЩҶШёЩҲЩ…Ш© MiladyШҢ ШӯЩҠШ« ЩҠШӘШ№Ш§ЩҠШҙ ЩҲЩғЩ„Ш§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩғШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШөШ·ЩҶШ§Ш№ЩҠ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШЁШҙШұ ЩҲЩҠШӘЩҶШ§ЩҒШіЩҲЩҶ ЩҲЩҠШӘШ№Ш§ЩҲЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩҲЩҠШӘШ№Щ„Щ…ЩҲЩҶ ЩҲЩҠЩғШіШЁЩҲЩҶ ЩҲЩҠШӘШ·ЩҲШұЩҲЩҶ Щ„ШӯШёЩҠШ§.
ar.body: ЩӮШҜЩ…ШӘ Clawville ШЈЩҲЩ„ Щ„Ш№ШЁШ© MMORPG ШЁШ№Ш§Щ„Щ… Щ…ЩҒШӘЩҲШӯ ШЈШөЩ„ЩҠШ© Щ„Щ„Ш°ЩғШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШөШ·ЩҶШ§Ш№ЩҠ ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ Щ…ЩҶШёЩҲЩ…Ш© Milady. ЩҠШ·ШұШӯ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ№Щ„Ш§ЩҶ ШЁЩҠШҰШ© Щ„Ш№ШЁ ЩҠШіШӘШ·ЩҠШ№ ЩҒЩҠЩҮШ§ ЩҲЩғЩ„Ш§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩғШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШөШ·ЩҶШ§Ш№ЩҠ ЩҲШ§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…ЩҲЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШЁШҙШұ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№Ш§ЩҠШҙ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘЩҶШ§ЩҒШі ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШ№Ш§ЩҲЩҶ ЩҒЩҠ Ш§Щ„ЩҲЩӮШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҒШ№Щ„ЩҠ ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠ ЩҲШ§ШӯШҜ. ЩҲЩҠЩҒЩҠШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШө Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩ„ЩҠ ШЁШЈЩҶ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Ш№Ш§Щ„Щ… ЩҠШіШӘЩҮШҜЩҒ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№Щ„Щ… ЩҲШӘШӯЩӮЩҠЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШҜШ®Щ„ ЩҲШ§Щ„ШӘШ·ЩҲШұ ШЁШөЩҲШұШ© Щ…ШҙШӘШұЩғШ©. ЩҠШЈШӘЩҠ Ш°Щ„Щғ Ш¶Щ…ЩҶ ШӘЩҲШ¬ЩҮ Щ…ШӘШІШ§ЩҠШҜ Щ„Ш¬Ш№Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШҜЩҒЩҲШ№ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш°ЩғШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШөШ·ЩҶШ§Ш№ЩҠ Ш¬ШІШЎШ§ ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ§ Щ…ЩҶ ШӘШ¬ШұШЁШ© Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш№ШЁ. ЩҲШӘШҙЩҠШұ Щ…ШӯШ§ЩҲЩ„Ш© Clawville ШҘЩ„Щү ШЈЩҶ ШЈЩ„Ш№Ш§ШЁ MMORPG Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҒШӘЩҲШӯШ© ЩӮШҜ ШӘШӘШ¬Ш§ЩҲШІ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШӘЩҲЩү Ш§Щ„Ш«Ш§ШЁШӘ ЩҶШӯЩҲ Щ…ШіШ§ШӯШ§ШӘ ШӘШӘШәЩҠШұ Щ…Ш№ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘШ®ШҜЩ…ЩҠЩҶ ЩҲШ§Щ„Ш°ЩғШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШөШ·ЩҶШ§Ш№ЩҠ. Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШҜШұ: cointelegraph.com.

hi.title: Clawville аӨЁаҘҮ Milady аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ AI-аӨЁаҘҮаӨҹаӨҝаӨө аӨ“аӨӘаӨЁ-аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨІаҘҚаӨЎ MMORPG аӨӘаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ
hi.excerpt: Clawville аӨЁаҘҮ Milady аӨҮаӨ•аҘӢаӨёаӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаӨ® аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаӨҫ AI-аӨЁаҘҮаӨҹаӨҝаӨө аӨ“аӨӘаӨЁ-аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨІаҘҚаӨЎ MMORPG аӨӘаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨӮ AI аӨҸаӨңаҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨҮаӨӮаӨёаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨІ аӨҹаӨҫаӨҮаӨ® аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ°аӨ№аӨӨаҘҮ, аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨӘаӨ°аҘҚаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҮ, аӨёаӨ№аӨҜаҘӢаӨ— аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҮ, аӨёаҘҖаӨ–аӨӨаҘҮ, аӨ•аӨ®аӨҫаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨөаӨҝаӨ•аӨёаӨҝаӨӨ аӨ№аҘӢаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ
hi.body: Clawville аӨЁаҘҮ Milady аӨҮаӨ•аҘӢаӨёаӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨҹаӨ® аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаӨҫ AI-аӨЁаҘҮаӨҹаӨҝаӨө аӨ“аӨӘаӨЁ-аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨІаҘҚаӨЎ MMORPG аӨӘаҘҮаӨ¶ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨІаҘүаӨЁаҘҚаӨҡ аӨҗаӨёаҘҮ аӨ—аҘҮаӨ®аӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨ®аӨҫаӨ№аҘҢаӨІ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ°аӨ–аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨңаӨ№аӨҫаӨӮ AI аӨҸаӨңаҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ аӨ”аӨ° аӨ®аӨҫаӨЁаӨө аӨүаӨӘаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аӨ•аӨ°аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ№аҘҖ аӨЎаӨҝаӨңаӨҝаӨҹаӨІ аӨҰаҘҒаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨІ аӨҹаӨҫаӨҮаӨ® аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨёаӨҫаӨҘ аӨ°аӨ№ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ, аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨёаҘҚаӨӘаӨ°аҘҚаӨ§аӨҫ аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨ”аӨ° аӨёаӨ№аӨҜаҘӢаӨ— аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨ®аҘӮаӨІ аӨ°аӨҝаӨӘаҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҒаӨёаӨҫаӨ°, аӨҜаӨ№ аӨҰаҘҒаӨЁаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨёаӨҫаӨқаӨҫ аӨёаҘҖаӨ–аӨЁаҘҮ, аӨ•аӨ®аӨҫаӨҲ аӨ”аӨ° аӨөаӨҝаӨ•аӨҫаӨё аӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаӨӮаӨ°аӨҡаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨІаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ•аӨ°аӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҮаӨёаӨ•аҘҮ аӨӘаҘҖаӨӣаҘҮ аӨ—аҘҮаӨ®аӨӘаҘҚаӨІаҘҮ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ AI-аӨҶаӨ§аӨҫаӨ°аӨҝаӨӨ аӨҮаӨӮаӨҹаӨ°аҘҲаӨ•аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ®аҘҒаӨ–аҘҚаӨҜ аӨӨаӨӨаҘҚаӨө аӨ¬аӨЁаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаӨӨаҘҖ аӨҰаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ Clawville аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІ аӨҰаӨҝаӨ–аӨҫаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ“аӨӘаӨЁ-аӨөаӨ°аҘҚаӨІаҘҚаӨЎ MMORPG аӨёаҘҚаӨҘаӨҝаӨ° аӨ•аӨӮаӨҹаҘҮаӨӮаӨҹ аӨёаҘҮ аӨҶаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаӨ•аӨ° аӨҗаӨёаҘҮ аӨёаҘҚаӨӘаҘҮаӨё аӨ¬аӨЁ аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮ аӨңаӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨ№аҘҮаӨӮ аӨүаӨӘаӨҜаҘӢаӨ—аӨ•аӨ°аҘҚаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ”аӨ° AI аӨ®аӨҝаӨІаӨ•аӨ° аӨ¬аӨҰаӨІаӨӨаҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨёаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨӨ: cointelegraph.com.

id.title: Clawville Bawa MMORPG Open-World AI-Native ke Milady
id.excerpt: Clawville memperkenalkan MMORPG open-world AI-native pertama di ekosistem Milady, tempat agen AI dan manusia hidup berdampingan, bersaing, berkolaborasi, belajar, menghasilkan, dan berevolusi secara real time.
id.body: Clawville memperkenalkan MMORPG open-world AI-native pertama ke dalam ekosistem Milady. Peluncuran ini menampilkan lingkungan gim tempat agen AI dan pengguna manusia dapat hidup berdampingan, bersaing, dan berkolaborasi secara real time dalam satu dunia digital. Teks asli menyebut dunia ini diarahkan untuk mendukung pembelajaran, perolehan nilai, dan evolusi bersama. Latar belakangnya adalah dorongan untuk menjadikan interaksi berbasis AI sebagai elemen inti permainan. Upaya Clawville menunjukkan bahwa MMORPG open-world dapat melampaui konten tetap menuju ruang yang berubah bersama pengguna dan AI. Sumber: cointelegraph.com.

ko.title: XRP мғҒмҠ№, л№„нҠёмҪ”мқёВ·мқҙлҚ”В·лҸ„м§ҖмҪ”мқё м•Ҫм„ё мҶҚ $1.49 лҸҢнҢҢ мЈјлӘ©
ko.excerpt: ліҖлҸҷм„ұ нҒ° мһҘм„ём—җм„ң XRPк°Җ мЈјмҡ” нҶ нҒ°ліҙлӢӨ к°•н•ң нқҗлҰ„мқ„ ліҙмҳҖкі , мһҘ нӣ„л°ҳ кұ°лһҳлҹү мҰқк°ҖлЎң мҲҳмЈјк°„ лһ лҰ¬лҘј л§үм•„мҳЁ $1.49 м Җн•ӯм„  мһ¬мӢңн—ҳм—җ кҙҖмӢ¬мқҙ лӘЁмҳҖлӢӨ.
ko.body: ліҖлҸҷм„ұмқҙ м»Өм§„ мқҙлІҲ кұ°лһҳм—җм„ң XRPлҠ” л№„нҠёмҪ”мқё, мқҙлҚ”, лҸ„м§ҖмҪ”мқёмқҙ н•ҳлқҪн•ң к°ҖмҡҙлҚ° мғҒлҢҖм ҒмңјлЎң мғҒмҠ№н•ҳл©° мЈјмҡ” нҶ нҒ° лҢҖл№„ к°•н•ң мӣҖм§Ғмһ„мқ„ ліҙмҳҖлӢӨ. мһҘ нӣ„л°ҳ кұ°лһҳлҹүмқҙ кёүмҰқн•ҳл©ҙм„ң к°ҖкІ©мқҖ мөңк·ј лӘҮ мЈј лҸҷм•Ҳ мғҒмҠ№ мӢңлҸ„лҘј м ңн•ңн•ҙ мҳЁ м Җн•ӯ кө¬к°„мңјлЎң лӢӨмӢң м ‘к·јн–ҲлӢӨ. мӢңмһҘмқҳ мҙҲм җмқҖ XRPк°Җ $1.49 л¶Җк·ј лҸҢнҢҢ кө¬к°„мқ„ л„ҳм–ҙм„Ө мҲҳ мһҲлҠ”м§Җм—җ л§һм¶°мЎҢлӢӨ. мқҙ кө¬к°„мқҖ к·ёлҸҷм•Ҳ лһ лҰ¬лҘј л§үм•„мҳЁ к°ҖкІ©лҢҖлЎң м–ёкёүлҗҗлӢӨ. XRPмқҳ лӢЁкё° нқҗлҰ„мқҖ мЈјмҡ” м•”нҳёнҷ”нҸҗк°Җ м•Ҫм„ёлҘј ліҙмқё мһҘм„ё мҶҚм—җм„ңлҸ„ м Җн•ӯ мһ¬мӢңн—ҳ м—¬л¶Җм—җ л”°лқј мЈјлӘ©мқ„ л°ӣмқ„ м „л§қмқҙлӢӨ. м¶ңмІҳ: coindesk.com

en.title: XRP Rises as Bitcoin, Ether and Dogecoin Slip, $1.49 Breakout in Focus
en.excerpt: XRP outperformed major tokens in a volatile session as late volume pushed price back toward the $1.49 resistance area that has capped rallies for weeks.
en.body: XRP moved higher during a volatile trading session while bitcoin, ether and dogecoin slipped, showing stronger relative performance than major tokens. A late burst in volume pushed XRP back toward a resistance area that has limited rally attempts for several weeks. Market attention is now centered on whether XRP can break through the zone near $1.49. That level has been cited as the area that has capped recent upside moves. XRPвҖҷs short-term direction is likely to remain in focus as traders watch the resistance retest amid broader weakness in major cryptocurrencies. Source: coindesk.com

es.title: XRP sube mientras bitcoin, ether y dogecoin caen; foco en ruptura de $1,49
es.excerpt: XRP superГі a los principales tokens en una sesiГіn volГЎtil, con un aumento tardГӯo del volumen que llevГі el precio hacia la resistencia de $1,49.
es.body: XRP avanzГі durante una sesiГіn de negociaciГіn volГЎtil mientras bitcoin, ether y dogecoin retrocedieron, mostrando un desempeГұo relativo mГЎs fuerte que otros tokens importantes. Un repunte tardГӯo del volumen llevГі el precio de XRP de nuevo hacia una zona de resistencia que ha limitado los intentos de rally durante varias semanas. La atenciГіn del mercado se centra ahora en si XRP puede superar el ГЎrea cercana a $1,49. Ese nivel ha sido seГұalado como la zona que ha frenado las subidas recientes. En un contexto de debilidad entre las principales criptomonedas, la evoluciГіn de corto plazo de XRP seguirГЎ ligada a esta nueva prueba de resistencia. Fuente: coindesk.com

pt.title: XRP sobe enquanto bitcoin, ether e dogecoin caem; ruptura em US$ 1,49 no radar
pt.excerpt: XRP superou os principais tokens em uma sessГЈo volГЎtil, com salto tardio no volume levando o preГ§o de volta Г  resistГӘncia perto de US$ 1,49.
pt.body: O XRP avanГ§ou durante uma sessГЈo de negociaГ§ГЈo volГЎtil, enquanto bitcoin, ether e dogecoin recuaram, mostrando desempenho relativo mais forte que os principais tokens. Um aumento tardio no volume empurrou o preГ§o do XRP de volta para uma zona de resistГӘncia que vem limitando tentativas de alta hГЎ vГЎrias semanas. A atenГ§ГЈo do mercado agora estГЎ voltada para a possibilidade de o XRP romper a regiГЈo prГіxima de US$ 1,49. Esse nГӯvel foi citado como a faixa que conteve os ralis recentes. Em meio Г  fraqueza das principais criptomoedas, o movimento de curto prazo do XRP deve seguir em foco conforme a resistГӘncia Г© novamente testada. Fonte: coindesk.com

de.title: XRP steigt, wГӨhrend Bitcoin, Ether und Dogecoin fallen: $1,49 im Fokus
de.excerpt: XRP schnitt in einer volatilen Sitzung besser ab als groГҹe Token; ein spГӨter Volumenschub fГјhrte den Preis zurГјck zur Widerstandszone um $1,49.
de.body: XRP legte in einer volatilen Handelssitzung zu, wГӨhrend Bitcoin, Ether und Dogecoin nachgaben, und zeigte damit eine stГӨrkere relative Entwicklung als wichtige Token. Ein spГӨter Anstieg des Handelsvolumens brachte den XRP-Preis wieder in Richtung einer Widerstandszone, die Rallyversuche seit mehreren Wochen begrenzt. Der Fokus des Marktes liegt nun darauf, ob XRP den Bereich nahe $1,49 durchbrechen kann. Dieses Niveau gilt als Zone, die jГјngste AufwГӨrtsbewegungen gedeckelt hat. Da groГҹe KryptowГӨhrungen schwГӨcher tendierten, dГјrfte die kurzfristige Entwicklung von XRP weiter an den erneuten Test dieses Widerstands gebunden bleiben. Quelle: coindesk.com

fr.title: XRP progresse tandis que bitcoin, ether et dogecoin reculent; seuil de 1,49 $ surveillГ©
fr.excerpt: XRP a surperformГ© les grands jetons lors dвҖҷune sГ©ance volatile, portГ© en fin de session par un volume accru vers la rГ©sistance proche de 1,49 $.
fr.body: XRP a progressГ© lors dвҖҷune sГ©ance de marchГ© volatile, tandis que bitcoin, ether et dogecoin ont reculГ©, affichant une performance relative supГ©rieure Г  celle des principaux jetons. Une hausse tardive du volume a ramenГ© le prix de XRP vers une zone de rГ©sistance qui limite les tentatives de rallye depuis plusieurs semaines. LвҖҷattention du marchГ© se concentre dГ©sormais sur la capacitГ© de XRP Г  franchir la zone proche de 1,49 $. Ce niveau est prГ©sentГ© comme celui qui a plafonnГ© les hausses rГ©centes. Dans un contexte de faiblesse des grandes cryptomonnaies, lвҖҷГ©volution Г  court terme de XRP restera liГ©e au nouveau test de cette rГ©sistance. Source : coindesk.com

ar.title: Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ XRP Щ…Ш№ ШӘШұШ§Ш¬Ш№ ШЁЩҠШӘЩғЩҲЩҠЩҶ ЩҲШҘЩҠШ«Шұ ЩҲШҜЩҲШ¬ЩғЩҲЩҠЩҶ ЩҲШӘШұЩӮШЁ Ш§Ш®ШӘШұШ§ЩӮ 1.49 ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш§Шұ
ar.excerpt: ШӘЩҒЩҲЩӮ XRP Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ© ЩҒЩҠ Ш¬Щ„ШіШ© Щ…ШӘЩӮЩ„ШЁШ©ШҢ ШЁШ№ШҜЩ…Ш§ ШҜЩҒШ№ Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№ Щ…ШӘШЈШ®Шұ ЩҒЩҠ ШӯШ¬Щ… Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШ§ЩҲЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШіШ№Шұ Щ…Ш¬ШҜШҜШ§ ЩҶШӯЩҲ Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ…Ш© 1.49 ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш§Шұ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩҠ ШӯШҜШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөШ№ЩҲШҜ Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШЁЩҠШ№.
ar.body: Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ№ XRP Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш¬Щ„ШіШ© ШӘШҜШ§ЩҲЩ„ Щ…ШӘЩӮЩ„ШЁШ©ШҢ ШЁЩҠЩҶЩ…Ш§ ШӘШұШ§Ш¬Ш№ШӘ ШЁЩҠШӘЩғЩҲЩҠЩҶ ЩҲШҘЩҠШ«Шұ ЩҲШҜЩҲШ¬ЩғЩҲЩҠЩҶШҢ Щ„ЩҠШёЩҮШұ ШЈШҜШ§ШЎ ШЈЩӮЩҲЩү ЩҶШіШЁЩҠШ§ Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ШұШҰЩҠШіЩҠШ©. ЩҲШҜЩҒШ№ Ш§ЩҶШҜЩҒШ§Ш№ Щ…ШӘШЈШ®Шұ ЩҒЩҠ ШӯШ¬Щ… Ш§Щ„ШӘШҜШ§ЩҲЩ„ ШіШ№Шұ XRP Щ„Щ„Ш№ЩҲШҜШ© ЩҶШӯЩҲ Щ…ЩҶШ·ЩӮШ© Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ…Ш© ШӯШҜШӘ Щ…ШӯШ§ЩҲЩ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШөШ№ЩҲШҜ Ш®Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШЈШіШ§ШЁЩҠШ№ Ш§Щ„Щ…Ш§Ш¶ЩҠШ©. ЩҠШӘШұЩғШІ Ш§ЩҮШӘЩ…Ш§Щ… Ш§Щ„ШіЩҲЩӮ Ш§Щ„ШўЩҶ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…Ш§ ШҘШ°Ш§ ЩғШ§ЩҶ XRP ЩӮШ§ШҜШұШ§ Ш№Щ„Щү Ш§Ш®ШӘШұШ§ЩӮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩҶШ·ЩӮШ© Ш§Щ„ЩӮШұЩҠШЁШ© Щ…ЩҶ 1.49 ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш§Шұ. ЩҲЩӮШҜ Ш°ЩҸЩғШұ ЩҮШ°Ш§ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү ШЁЩҲШөЩҒЩҮ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШ·Ш§ЩӮ Ш§Щ„Ш°ЩҠ ЩғШЁШӯ Ш§Щ„Ш§ШұШӘЩҒШ§Ш№Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ®ЩҠШұШ©. ЩҲЩ…Ш№ Ш¶Ш№ЩҒ Ш§Щ„Ш№Щ…Щ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„ШұЩӮЩ…ЩҠШ© Ш§Щ„ЩғШЁШұЩүШҢ ШіЩҠШЁЩӮЩү Ш§Щ„Щ…ШіШ§Шұ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШөЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ¬Щ„ Щ„ЩҖ XRP Щ…ШӯЩ„ Щ…ШӘШ§ШЁШ№Ш© Щ…Ш№ ШҘШ№Ш§ШҜШ© Ш§Ш®ШӘШЁШ§Шұ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ЩӮШ§ЩҲЩ…Ш©. Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШҜШұ: coindesk.com

hi.title: XRP аӨҡаӨўаӨјаӨҫ, аӨ¬аӨҝаӨҹаӨ•аҘүаӨҮаӨЁ, аӨҲаӨҘаӨ° аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаҘүаӨңаӨ•аҘүаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ«аӨҝаӨёаӨІаҘҮ; $1.49 аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аӨҶаӨүаӨҹ аӨӘаӨ° аӨЁаӨңаӨ°
hi.excerpt: аӨ…аӨёаҘҚаӨҘаӨҝаӨ° аӨёаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ XRP аӨЁаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ®аҘҒаӨ– аӨҹаҘӢаӨ•аӨЁ аӨёаҘҮ аӨ¬аҘҮаӨ№аӨӨаӨ° аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨҰаӨ°аҘҚаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ, аӨҰаҘҮаӨ° аӨёаҘҮ аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаҘҮ аӨөаҘүаӨІаҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨ® аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҖаӨ®аӨӨ аӨ•аҘӢ $1.49 аӨ•аҘҮ аӨүаӨё аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨ°аҘӢаӨ§ аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аҘҮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ“аӨ° аӨІаҘҢаӨҹаӨҫаӨҜаӨҫ аӨңаӨҝаӨёаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ°аҘҲаӨІаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ•аӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ
hi.body: аӨҸаӨ• аӨ…аӨёаҘҚаӨҘаӨҝаӨ° аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨЎаӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨёаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ XRP аӨҠаӨӘаӨ° аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ, аӨңаӨ¬аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ¬аӨҝаӨҹаӨ•аҘүаӨҮаӨЁ, аӨҲаӨҘаӨ° аӨ”аӨ° аӨЎаҘүаӨңаӨ•аҘүаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ«аӨҝаӨёаӨІаҘҮ, аӨңаӨҝаӨёаӨёаҘҮ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ®аҘҒаӨ– аӨҹаҘӢаӨ•аӨЁ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӨаҘҒаӨІаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ®аӨңаӨ¬аҘӮаӨӨ аӨҰаӨҝаӨ–аӨҫаҘӨ аӨёаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨӮаӨӨ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨөаҘүаӨІаҘҚаӨҜаҘӮаӨ® аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨңаҘҖ аӨҶаӨҲ аӨ”аӨ° XRP аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖаӨ®аӨӨ аӨ«аӨҝаӨ° аӨүаӨё аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨ°аҘӢаӨ§ аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аҘҮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҖаӨ¬ аӨӘаӨ№аҘҒаӨӮаӨҡаҘҖ аӨңаӨҝаӨёаӨЁаҘҮ аӨӘаӨҝаӨӣаӨІаҘҮ аӨ•аӨҲ аӨ№аӨ«аҘҚаӨӨаҘӢаӨӮ аӨёаҘҮ аӨӨаҘҮаӨңаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аҘӢаӨ¶аӨҝаӨ¶аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨёаҘҖаӨ®аӨҝаӨӨ аӨ•аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨңаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аӨҫ аӨ§аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ…аӨ¬ аӨҮаӨё аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӨ аӨӘаӨ° аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ•аҘҚаӨҜаӨҫ XRP $1.49 аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӘаӨҫаӨё аӨёаҘҚаӨҘаӨҝаӨӨ аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аӨҶаӨүаӨҹ аӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аҘҮаӨӨаҘҚаӨ° аӨ•аҘӢ аӨӘаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аӨ° аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨ° аӨ№аӨҫаӨІаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ°аҘҲаӨІаӨҝаӨҜаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ°аҘӢаӨ•аӨЁаҘҮ аӨөаӨҫаӨІаҘҮ аӨҰаӨҫаӨҜаӨ°аҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ°аҘӮаӨӘ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨёаӨҫаӨ®аӨЁаҘҮ аӨҶаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ®аҘҒаӨ– аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨӘаҘҚаӨҹаҘӢаӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨӮаӨёаҘҖ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ•аӨ®аӨңаҘӢаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аҘҖаӨҡ XRP аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ…аӨІаҘҚаӨӘаӨ•аӨҫаӨІаӨҝаӨ• аӨҡаӨҫаӨІ аӨҮаӨёаҘҖ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨӨаӨҝаӨ°аҘӢаӨ§ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҰаҘӢаӨ¬аӨҫаӨ°аӨҫ аӨӘаӨ°аҘҖаӨ•аҘҚаӨ·аӨҫ аӨӘаӨ° аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨӯаӨ° аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮаӨ—аҘҖаҘӨ аӨёаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨӨ: coindesk.com

id.title: XRP Menguat Saat Bitcoin, Ether dan Dogecoin Turun; Fokus ke Breakout $1,49
id.excerpt: XRP mengungguli token utama dalam sesi volatil, dengan lonjakan volume akhir mendorong harga kembali ke resistance $1,49 yang menahan reli berminggu-minggu.
id.body: XRP bergerak naik dalam sesi perdagangan yang volatil, sementara bitcoin, ether, dan dogecoin melemah, menunjukkan kinerja relatif lebih kuat dibanding token utama. Lonjakan volume pada akhir sesi mendorong harga XRP kembali mendekati area resistance yang selama beberapa minggu membatasi upaya reli. Fokus pasar kini tertuju pada apakah XRP dapat menembus zona dekat $1,49. Level tersebut disebut sebagai area yang menahan kenaikan terbaru. Di tengah pelemahan kripto utama, arah jangka pendek XRP kemungkinan tetap menjadi perhatian saat pasar mengamati pengujian ulang resistance ini. Sumber: coindesk.com

ko.title: нҒҙлһҳлҰ¬нӢ°лІ• м§„м „ л¶„мҲҳл №, лҜё мғҒмӣҗ мқҖн–үмң„ н•өмӢ¬ мІӯл¬ёнҡҢ к°ңмөң
ko.excerpt: лҜё мғҒмӣҗ мқҖн–үмң„мӣҗнҡҢк°Җ лӘ©мҡ”мқј мӢңмһҘкө¬мЎ° лІ•м•Ҳ н‘ңкІ°м—җ м•һм„ң нҒҙлһҳлҰ¬нӢ°лІ• кҙҖл Ё мҲҳм •м•Ҳмқ„ л…јмқҳн•ҳл©° мһ…лІ• м§„м „ м—¬л¶ҖлҘј к°ҖлҘј н•өмӢ¬ м Ҳм°Ём—җ л“Өм–ҙк°„лӢӨ.
ko.body: лҜё мғҒмӣҗ мқҖн–үмң„мӣҗнҡҢк°Җ лӘ©мҡ”мқј нҒҙлһҳлҰ¬нӢ°лІ• м§„м „мқ„ мң„н•ң н•өмӢ¬ мІӯл¬ёнҡҢлҘј м—ҙкі , мӢңмһҘкө¬мЎ° лІ•м•Ҳм—җ лҢҖн•ң мҲҳм •м•Ҳмқ„ л…јмқҳн•ң л’Ө мөңмў… н‘ңкІ°м—җ лӮҳм„Ө мҳҲм •мқҙлӢӨ. мқҙлІҲ м Ҳм°ЁлҠ” лІ•м•Ҳмқҙ мң„мӣҗнҡҢ лӢЁкі„м—җм„ң м•һмңјлЎң лӮҳм•„к°Ҳ мҲҳ мһҲлҠ”м§ҖлҘј к°ҖлҠ н•ҳлҠ” мӨ‘мҡ”н•ң мқјм •мқҙлӢӨ. мӣҗл¬ём—җ л”°лҘҙл©ҙ мң„мӣҗнҡҢлҠ” н‘ңкІ°м—җ м•һм„ң мҲҳм •м•Ҳмқ„ лЁјм Җ нҶ лЎ н•ңлӢӨ. лІ•м•Ҳмқҳ кө¬мІҙм Ғ мҲҳм • лӮҙмҡ©мқҙлӮҳ н‘ңкІ° кІ°кіјлҠ” мӣҗл¬ём—җм„ң м ңмӢңлҗҳм§Җ м•Ҡм•ҳлӢӨ. мӢңмһҘкө¬мЎ° мһ…лІ•мқ„ л‘ҳлҹ¬мӢј н–Ҙнӣ„ л…јмқҳлҠ” мқҙлӮ  мң„мӣҗнҡҢ н‘ңкІ° м§„н–ү м—¬л¶Җм—җ л”°лқј лӢӨмқҢ лӢЁкі„к°Җ кІ°м •лҗ  м „л§қмқҙлӢӨ. м¶ңмІҳ: coindesk.com.

en.title: Clarity Act Faces Key Senate Banking Committee Hearing
en.excerpt: The U.S. Senate Banking Committee will debate amendments on Thursday before voting on market structure legislation tied to the Clarity Act.
en.body: The U.S. Senate Banking Committee is set to hold a key hearing on Thursday to advance the Clarity Act, with members expected to debate amendments before a final vote on market structure legislation. The proceeding is an important committee-stage step for whether the bill can move forward. According to the original report, the committee will first discuss amendments before voting. The report did not provide details on specific amendments or the outcome of the vote. The next phase of market structure legislation will depend on how the committee process proceeds. Source: coindesk.com.

es.title: La Ley Clarity afronta una audiencia clave en el Senado de EE. UU.
es.excerpt: El ComitГ© Bancario del Senado de EE. UU. debatirГЎ el jueves enmiendas antes de votar la legislaciГіn de estructura de mercado vinculada a Clarity.
es.body: El ComitГ© Bancario del Senado de Estados Unidos celebrarГЎ el jueves una audiencia clave para impulsar la Ley Clarity, con un debate de enmiendas antes de la votaciГіn final sobre la legislaciГіn de estructura de mercado. El procedimiento marca una etapa importante para evaluar si el proyecto puede avanzar dentro del comitГ©. SegГәn el informe original, el comitГ© discutirГЎ primero las enmiendas antes de votar. El texto no detalla las enmiendas concretas ni el resultado de la votaciГіn. La siguiente fase de la legislaciГіn dependerГЎ de cГіmo avance este proceso. Fuente: coindesk.com.

pt.title: Lei Clarity avanГ§a para audiГӘncia-chave no Senado dos EUA
pt.excerpt: O ComitГӘ BancГЎrio do Senado dos EUA debaterГЎ emendas na quinta-feira antes de votar a legislaГ§ГЈo de estrutura de mercado ligada Г  Clarity.
pt.body: O ComitГӘ BancГЎrio do Senado dos Estados Unidos realizarГЎ na quinta-feira uma audiГӘncia-chave para avanГ§ar a Lei Clarity, com debate de emendas antes da votaГ§ГЈo final sobre a legislaГ§ГЈo de estrutura de mercado. O procedimento Г© uma etapa relevante para avaliar se o projeto poderГЎ avanГ§ar no comitГӘ. Segundo o relato original, o comitГӘ discutirГЎ as emendas antes de votar. O texto nГЈo apresenta detalhes sobre emendas especГӯficas nem sobre o resultado da votaГ§ГЈo. A prГіxima fase da legislaГ§ГЈo dependerГЎ do andamento desse processo no comitГӘ. Fonte: coindesk.com.

de.title: Clarity Act vor SchlГјsselanhГ¶rung im US-Senatsausschuss
de.excerpt: Der Bankenausschuss des US-Senats will am Donnerstag Г„nderungsantrГӨge beraten, bevor er Гјber Marktstruktur-Gesetzgebung zum Clarity Act abstimmt.
de.body: Der Bankenausschuss des US-Senats hГӨlt am Donnerstag eine wichtige AnhГ¶rung ab, um den Clarity Act voranzubringen. Dabei sollen Г„nderungsantrГӨge beraten werden, bevor Гјber die Marktstruktur-Gesetzgebung abgestimmt wird. Das Verfahren ist ein wichtiger Schritt, um zu prГјfen, ob der Entwurf auf Ausschussebene weiterkommt. Dem Originalbericht zufolge diskutiert der Ausschuss zunГӨchst die Г„nderungsantrГӨge und stimmt danach ab. Konkrete Г„nderungen oder ein Abstimmungsergebnis nennt der Bericht nicht. Die nГӨchste Phase hГӨngt vom Verlauf dieses Ausschussverfahrens ab. Quelle: coindesk.com.

fr.title: Clarity Act: audience clГ© au comitГ© bancaire du SГ©nat amГ©ricain
fr.excerpt: Le comitГ© bancaire du SГ©nat amГ©ricain dГ©battra jeudi dвҖҷamendements avant de voter sur la lГ©gislation de structure de marchГ© liГ©e au Clarity Act.
fr.body: Le comitГ© bancaire du SГ©nat des Гүtats-Unis tiendra jeudi une audience clГ© pour faire avancer le Clarity Act, avec un dГ©bat sur des amendements avant le vote final sur la lГ©gislation de structure de marchГ©. Cette Г©tape permettra de mesurer si le texte peut progresser au niveau du comitГ©. Selon le rapport original, le comitГ© discutera dвҖҷabord les amendements avant de procГ©der au vote. Le texte ne prГ©cise pas le contenu des amendements ni le rГ©sultat du vote. La suite du processus dГ©pendra de lвҖҷavancement de cette procГ©dure en comitГ©. Source: coindesk.com.

ar.title: ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩғЩ„Ш§ШұЩҠШӘЩҠ ШЈЩ…Ш§Щ… Ш¬Щ„ШіШ© ШӯШ§ШіЩ…Ш© ЩҒЩҠ Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶЩҲЩғ ШЁЩ…Ш¬Щ„Ші Ш§Щ„ШҙЩҠЩҲШ®
ar.excerpt: ШӘШЁШӯШ« Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶЩҲЩғ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Щ„Ші Ш§Щ„ШҙЩҠЩҲШ® Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ЩҠШұЩғЩҠ ЩҠЩҲЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ…ЩҠШі ШӘШ№ШҜЩҠЩ„Ш§ШӘ Ш№Щ„Щү ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩғЩ„Ш§ШұЩҠШӘЩҠ ЩӮШЁЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘШөЩҲЩҠШӘ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘШҙШұЩҠШ№ ЩҮЩҠЩғЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҲЩӮ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШӘШЁШ· ШЁЩҮ.
ar.body: ШӘШ№ЩӮШҜ Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„ШЁЩҶЩҲЩғ ЩҒЩҠ Щ…Ш¬Щ„Ші Ш§Щ„ШҙЩҠЩҲШ® Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ЩҠШұЩғЩҠ ЩҠЩҲЩ… Ш§Щ„Ш®Щ…ЩҠШі Ш¬Щ„ШіШ© Щ…ЩҮЩ…Ш© Щ„ШҜЩҒШ№ ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ ЩғЩ„Ш§ШұЩҠШӘЩҠШҢ ШӯЩҠШ« Щ…ЩҶ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӘЩҲЩӮШ№ ШЈЩҶ ШӘЩҶШ§ЩӮШҙ ШӘШ№ШҜЩҠЩ„Ш§ШӘ ЩӮШЁЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШӘШөЩҲЩҠШӘ Ш§Щ„ЩҶЩҮШ§ШҰЩҠ Ш№Щ„Щү ШӘШҙШұЩҠШ№ ЩҮЩҠЩғЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҲЩӮ. ШӘЩ…Ш«Щ„ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„Ш®Ш·ЩҲШ© Щ…ШұШӯЩ„Ш© ШЈШіШ§ШіЩҠШ© Щ„Щ…Ш№ШұЩҒШ© Щ…Ш§ ШҘШ°Ш§ ЩғШ§ЩҶ Щ…ШҙШұЩҲШ№ Ш§Щ„ЩӮШ§ЩҶЩҲЩҶ ШіЩҠШӘЩӮШҜЩ… ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШ©. ЩҲШЁШӯШіШЁ Ш§Щ„ШӘЩӮШұЩҠШұ Ш§Щ„ШЈШөЩ„ЩҠШҢ ШіШӘЩҶШ§ЩӮШҙ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШ© Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№ШҜЩҠЩ„Ш§ШӘ ШЈЩҲЩ„Ш§ ЩӮШЁЩ„ ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ШӘШөЩҲЩҠШӘ. ЩҲЩ„Щ… ЩҠЩҲШұШҜ Ш§Щ„ЩҶШө ШӘЩҒШ§ШөЩҠЩ„ Ш№ЩҶ Ш§Щ„ШӘШ№ШҜЩҠЩ„Ш§ШӘ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШӯШҜШҜШ© ШЈЩҲ ЩҶШӘЩҠШ¬Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘШөЩҲЩҠШӘ. ЩҲШіШӘШӘЩҲЩӮЩҒ Ш§Щ„Щ…ШұШӯЩ„Ш© Ш§Щ„ШӘШ§Щ„ЩҠШ© Щ…ЩҶ ШӘШҙШұЩҠШ№ ЩҮЩҠЩғЩ„ Ш§Щ„ШіЩҲЩӮ Ш№Щ„Щү Щ…ШіШ§Шұ ЩҮШ°ЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШҘШ¬ШұШ§ШЎШ§ШӘ ШҜШ§Ш®Щ„ Ш§Щ„Щ„Ш¬ЩҶШ©. Ш§Щ„Щ…ШөШҜШұ: coindesk.com.

hi.title: Clarity Act аӨӘаӨ° аӨ…аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаҘҖаӨЁаҘҮаӨҹ аӨ¬аҘҲаӨӮаӨ•аӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨёаӨ®аӨҝаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ…аӨ№аӨ® аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨөаӨҫаӨҲ
hi.excerpt: аӨ…аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаҘҖаӨЁаҘҮаӨҹ аӨ¬аҘҲаӨӮаӨ•аӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨёаӨ®аӨҝаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ—аҘҒаӨ°аҘҒаӨөаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аҘӢ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨңаӨҫаӨ° аӨёаӨӮаӨ°аӨҡаӨЁаӨҫ аӨөаӨҝаӨ§аҘҮаӨҜаӨ• аӨӘаӨ° аӨ®аӨӨаӨҰаӨҫаӨЁ аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘҮ Clarity Act аӨёаҘҮ аӨңаҘҒаӨЎаӨјаҘҮ аӨёаӨӮаӨ¶аҘӢаӨ§аӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨӘаӨ° аӨ¬аӨ№аӨё аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨ—аҘҖаҘӨ
hi.body: аӨ…аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаҘҖаӨЁаҘҮаӨҹ аӨ¬аҘҲаӨӮаӨ•аӨҝаӨӮаӨ— аӨёаӨ®аӨҝаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ—аҘҒаӨ°аҘҒаӨөаӨҫаӨ° аӨ•аҘӢ Clarity Act аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҶаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаӨҫаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨҸаӨ• аӨ…аӨ№аӨ® аӨёаҘҒаӨЁаӨөаӨҫаӨҲ аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨ—аҘҖ, аӨңаӨҝаӨёаӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨңаӨҫаӨ° аӨёаӨӮаӨ°аӨҡаӨЁаӨҫ аӨөаӨҝаӨ§аҘҮаӨҜаӨ• аӨӘаӨ° аӨ…аӨӮаӨӨаӨҝаӨ® аӨ®аӨӨаӨҰаӨҫаӨЁ аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘҮ аӨёаӨӮаӨ¶аҘӢаӨ§аӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨӘаӨ° аӨҡаӨ°аҘҚаӨҡаӨҫ аӨ№аҘӢаӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨүаӨ®аҘҚаӨ®аҘҖаӨҰ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨҰаҘҮаӨ–аӨЁаҘҮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ®аӨ№аӨӨаҘҚаӨөаӨӘаҘӮаӨ°аҘҚаӨЈ аӨёаӨ®аӨҝаӨӨаӨҝ-аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨ°аҘҖаӨҜ аӨ•аӨҰаӨ® аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨөаӨҝаӨ§аҘҮаӨҜаӨ• аӨҶаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨўаӨј аӨёаӨ•аӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮаҘӨ аӨ®аҘӮаӨІ аӨ°аӨҝаӨӘаҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ…аӨЁаҘҒаӨёаӨҫаӨ°, аӨёаӨ®аӨҝаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ®аӨӨаӨҰаӨҫаӨЁ аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаӨ№аӨІаҘҮ аӨёаӨӮаӨ¶аҘӢаӨ§аӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨӘаӨ° аӨ¬аӨ№аӨё аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨ—аҘҖаҘӨ аӨ°аӨҝаӨӘаҘӢаӨ°аҘҚаӨҹ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ аӨ–аӨҫаӨё аӨёаӨӮаӨ¶аҘӢаӨ§аӨЁаҘӢаӨӮ аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ®аӨӨаӨҰаӨҫаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨӘаӨ°аӨҝаӨЈаӨҫаӨ® аӨ•аӨҫ аӨөаӨҝаӨөаӨ°аӨЈ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ аӨҰаӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ—аӨҜаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨңаӨҫаӨ° аӨёаӨӮаӨ°аӨҡаӨЁаӨҫ аӨ•аӨҫаӨЁаҘӮаӨЁ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ…аӨ—аӨІаҘҖ аӨҰаӨҝаӨ¶аӨҫ аӨҮаӨё аӨ¬аӨҫаӨӨ аӨӘаӨ° аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨӯаӨ° аӨ•аӨ°аҘҮаӨ—аҘҖ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨёаӨ®аӨҝаӨӨаӨҝ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аӨ•аҘҚаӨ°аӨҝаӨҜаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҲаӨёаҘҮ аӨҶаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲаҘӨ аӨёаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨӨ: coindesk.com.

id.title: Clarity Act Masuki Sidang Kunci Komite Perbankan Senat AS
id.excerpt: Komite Perbankan Senat AS pada Kamis akan membahas amandemen sebelum memungut suara atas legislasi struktur pasar terkait Clarity Act.
id.body: Komite Perbankan Senat Amerika Serikat akan menggelar sidang penting pada Kamis untuk memajukan Clarity Act, dengan pembahasan amandemen sebelum pemungutan suara akhir atas legislasi struktur pasar. Proses ini menjadi tahap penting untuk menilai apakah rancangan undang-undang dapat bergerak maju di tingkat komite. Menurut laporan asli, komite akan terlebih dahulu memperdebatkan amandemen sebelum voting. Laporan itu tidak memuat rincian amandemen tertentu atau hasil pemungutan suara. Tahap berikutnya akan bergantung pada jalannya proses komite tersebut. Sumber: coindesk.com.

ko.title: л№„нҠёмҪ”мқё 8л§ҢлӢ¬лҹ¬ лҸҢнҢҢ, лҜёкөӯ нҳ„л¬ј л§ӨмҲҳліҙлӢӨ л ҲлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ мЈјлҸ„
ko.excerpt: л№„нҠёмҪ”мқёмқҳ мөңк·ј 8л§ҢлӢ¬лҹ¬ лҸҢнҢҢ лһ лҰ¬лҠ” лҜёкөӯ кё°л°ҳ нҳ„л¬ј л§ӨмҲҳм„ёк°Җ м•„лӢҲлқј л ҲлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ нҠёл ҲмқҙлҚ”к°Җ мқҙлҒҲ кІғмңјлЎң лӮҳнғҖлӮҳ м§ҖмҶҚ к°ҖлҠҘм„ұм—җ мқҳл¬ёмқҙ м ңкё°лҗҗлӢӨ.
ko.body: л№„нҠёмҪ”мқёмқҙ мөңк·ј 8л§ҢлӢ¬лҹ¬лҘј лҸҢнҢҢн–Ҳм§Җл§Ң, мқҙлІҲ мғҒмҠ№мқҖ лҜёкөӯ кё°л°ҳ нҳ„л¬ј л§ӨмҲҳмһҗліҙлӢӨ л ҲлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ нҠёл ҲмқҙлҚ”к°Җ мЈјлҸ„н•ң кІғмңјлЎң лҚ°мқҙн„°к°Җ ліҙм—¬мӨҖлӢӨ. мқјл°ҳм ҒмңјлЎң нҳ„л¬ј л§ӨмҲҳм„ёлҠ” к°ҖкІ© мғҒмҠ№мқҳ кё°л°ҳмңјлЎң н•ҙм„қлҗҳм§Җл§Ң, л ҲлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ мӨ‘мӢ¬мқҳ мӣҖм§Ғмһ„мқҖ мӢңмһҘмқҙ м°Ёмһ… нҸ¬м§Җм…ҳм—җ лҚ” нҒ¬кІҢ мқҳмЎҙн–ҲлӢӨлҠ” м җмқ„ мӢңмӮ¬н•ңлӢӨ. мқҙ л•Ңл¬ём—җ мқҙлІҲ лҸҢнҢҢк°Җ м•Ҳм •м ҒмңјлЎң мқҙм–ҙм§Ҳ мҲҳ мһҲлҠ”м§Җм—җ лҢҖн•ң мқҳл¬ёмқҙ м ңкё°лҗҳкі  мһҲлӢӨ. к°ҖкІ© нқҗлҰ„мқҳ н•өмӢ¬мқҖ 8л§ҢлӢ¬лҹ¬ лҸҢнҢҢ мһҗмІҙліҙлӢӨ лҲ„к°Җ л§ӨмҲҳлҘј мқҙлҒҢм—ҲлҠ”м§Җм—җ л§һм¶°м§„лӢӨ. м¶ңмІҳ: coindesk.com

en.title: Bitcoin $80K Breakout Led by Leverage, Not U.S. Spot Buyers
en.excerpt: BitcoinвҖҷs recent move above $80,000 was driven by leveraged traders rather than U.S.-based spot buyers, raising questions about the rallyвҖҷs sustainability.
en.body: Bitcoin recently broke above $80,000, but data show the move was led by leveraged traders rather than U.S.-based spot buyers. Spot demand is often viewed as a firmer base for price gains, while a leverage-led advance suggests the market relied more heavily on borrowed positions. That has raised questions about whether the breakout can be sustained. The key issue is not only that bitcoin crossed $80,000, but who drove the buying behind the move. Source: coindesk.com

es.title: Bitcoin supera 80.000 dГіlares impulsado por apalancamiento, no por spot de EE. UU.
es.excerpt: El reciente avance de bitcoin por encima de 80.000 dГіlares fue liderado por traders apalancados, no por compradores spot de EE. UU., lo que cuestiona su sostenibilidad.
es.body: Bitcoin superГі recientemente los 80.000 dГіlares, pero los datos muestran que el movimiento fue liderado por traders apalancados y no por compradores spot con base en Estados Unidos. La demanda spot suele interpretarse como una base mГЎs sГіlida para las subidas de precio, mientras que un avance impulsado por apalancamiento indica mayor dependencia de posiciones financiadas. Por eso surgen dudas sobre si la ruptura puede sostenerse. La clave no es solo el nivel de 80.000 dГіlares, sino quiГ©n impulsГі las compras. Fuente: coindesk.com

pt.title: Bitcoin rompe US$ 80 mil com forГ§a de alavancagem, nГЈo de spot dos EUA
pt.excerpt: A recente alta do bitcoin acima de US$ 80 mil foi liderada por traders alavancados, e nГЈo por compradores spot dos EUA, levantando dГәvidas sobre sua sustentaГ§ГЈo.
pt.body: O bitcoin rompeu recentemente a marca de US$ 80 mil, mas os dados mostram que o movimento foi liderado por traders alavancados, nГЈo por compradores spot baseados nos Estados Unidos. A demanda spot costuma ser vista como uma base mais firme para altas de preГ§o, enquanto um avanГ§o guiado por alavancagem sugere maior dependГӘncia de posiГ§Гөes financiadas. Por isso, a sustentabilidade do rompimento passou a ser questionada. O ponto central nГЈo Г© apenas o nГӯvel de US$ 80 mil, mas quem conduziu as compras. Fonte: coindesk.com

de.title: Bitcoin-Ausbruch Гјber 80.000 Dollar von Hebeltradern statt US-SpotkГӨufern getragen
de.excerpt: Der jГјngste Bitcoin-Anstieg Гјber 80.000 Dollar wurde laut Daten von gehebelten Tradern und nicht von US-SpotkГӨufern angefГјhrt, was Zweifel an der Nachhaltigkeit weckt.
de.body: Bitcoin ist zuletzt Гјber 80.000 Dollar gestiegen, doch Daten zeigen, dass die Bewegung von gehebelten Tradern und nicht von in den USA ansГӨssigen SpotkГӨufern angefГјhrt wurde. Spotnachfrage gilt oft als stabilere Grundlage fГјr Kursanstiege, wГӨhrend ein hebelgetriebener Anstieg auf eine stГӨrkere AbhГӨngigkeit von finanzierten Positionen hinweist. Dadurch wird infrage gestellt, ob der Ausbruch Bestand haben kann. Entscheidend ist nicht nur die Marke von 80.000 Dollar, sondern wer die KГӨufe getragen hat. Quelle: coindesk.com

fr.title: Bitcoin au-dessus de 80 000 dollars, portГ© par le levier plutГҙt que le spot amГ©ricain
fr.excerpt: La rГ©cente percГ©e du bitcoin au-dessus de 80 000 dollars a Г©tГ© menГ©e par des traders Г  effet de levier, non par des acheteurs spot amГ©ricains, ce qui interroge sa durabilitГ©.
fr.body: Le bitcoin a rГ©cemment franchi les 80 000 dollars, mais les donnГ©es montrent que le mouvement a Г©tГ© menГ© par des traders utilisant lвҖҷeffet de levier plutГҙt que par des acheteurs spot basГ©s aux Гүtats-Unis. La demande spot est souvent vue comme une base plus solide pour une hausse des prix, tandis quвҖҷun mouvement dominГ© par le levier suggГЁre une dГ©pendance accrue aux positions financГ©es. Cela soulГЁve des questions sur la capacitГ© de cette percГ©e Г  durer. LвҖҷenjeu nвҖҷest pas seulement le seuil de 80 000 dollars, mais lвҖҷorigine des achats. Source: coindesk.com

ar.title: Ш§Ш®ШӘШұШ§ЩӮ ШЁЩҠШӘЩғЩҲЩҠЩҶ Щ…ШіШӘЩҲЩү 80 ШЈЩ„ЩҒ ШҜЩҲЩ„Ш§Шұ ШӘЩӮЩҲШҜЩҮ Ш§Щ„ШұШ§ЩҒШ№Ш© Щ„Ш§ Ш§Щ„ШҙШұШ§ШЎ Ш§Щ„ЩҒЩҲШұЩҠ Ш§Щ„ШЈЩ…ШұЩҠЩғЩҠ

hi.title: аӨ¬аӨҝаӨҹаӨ•аҘүаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ•аӨҫ 80,000 аӨЎаҘүаӨІаӨ° аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аӨҶаӨүаӨҹ аӨ…аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аҘҖ аӨёаҘҚаӨӘаҘүаӨҹ аӨ–аӨ°аҘҖаӨҰ аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ, аӨІаҘҖаӨөаӨ°аҘҮаӨң аӨёаҘҮ аӨҡаӨІаӨҫ

hi.body: аӨ¬аӨҝаӨҹаӨ•аҘүаӨҮаӨЁ аӨ№аӨҫаӨІ аӨ®аҘҮаӨӮ 80,000 аӨЎаҘүаӨІаӨ° аӨёаҘҮ аӨҠаӨӘаӨ° аӨЁаӨҝаӨ•аӨІаӨҫ, аӨІаҘҮаӨ•аӨҝаӨЁ аӨЎаҘҮаӨҹаӨҫ аӨҰаӨҝаӨ–аӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨӨаҘҮаӨңаҘҖ аӨ…аӨ®аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨ•аӨҫ аӨёаҘҚаӨҘаӨҝаӨӨ аӨёаҘҚаӨӘаҘүаӨҹ аӨ–аӨ°аҘҖаӨҰаӨҫаӨ°аҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨңаӨҫаӨҜ аӨІаҘҖаӨөаӨ°аҘҮаӨң аӨҹаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨЎаӨ°аҘҚаӨё аӨЁаҘҮ аӨҡаӨІаӨҫаӨҲаҘӨ аӨёаҘҚаӨӘаҘүаӨҹ аӨ®аӨҫаӨӮаӨ— аӨ•аҘӢ аӨҶаӨ® аӨӨаҘҢаӨ° аӨӘаӨ° аӨ•аҘҖаӨ®аӨӨаҘӢаӨӮ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаӨӨ аӨ•аҘҮ аӨІаӨҝаӨҸ аӨ…аӨ§аӨҝаӨ• аӨ®аӨңаӨ¬аҘӮаӨӨ аӨҶаӨ§аӨҫаӨ° аӨ®аӨҫаӨЁаӨҫ аӨңаӨҫаӨӨаӨҫ аӨ№аҘҲ, аӨңаӨ¬аӨ•аӨҝ аӨІаҘҖаӨөаӨ°аҘҮаӨң аӨёаҘҮ аӨӘаҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ°аӨҝаӨӨ аӨҡаӨҫаӨІ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨёаӨӮаӨ•аҘҮаӨӨ аӨҰаҘҮаӨӨаҘҖ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ¬аӨҫаӨңаӨҫаӨ° аӨүаӨ§аӨҫаӨ° аӨҶаӨ§аӨҫаӨ°аӨҝаӨӨ аӨӘаҘӢаӨңаӨҝаӨ¶аӨЁ аӨӘаӨ° аӨ…аӨ§аӨҝаӨ• аӨЁаӨҝаӨ°аҘҚаӨӯаӨ° аӨҘаӨҫаҘӨ аӨҮаӨёаҘҖ аӨөаӨңаӨ№ аӨёаҘҮ аӨҮаӨё аӨ¬аҘҚаӨ°аҘҮаӨ•аӨҶаӨүаӨҹ аӨ•аҘҖ аӨҹаӨҝаӨ•аӨҫаӨҠаӨӘаӨЁ аӨӘаӨ° аӨёаӨөаӨҫаӨІ аӨүаӨ  аӨ°аӨ№аҘҮ аӨ№аҘҲаӨӮаҘӨ аӨ®аҘҒаӨҰаҘҚаӨҰаӨҫ аӨ•аҘҮаӨөаӨІ 80,000 аӨЎаҘүаӨІаӨ° аӨ•аӨҫ аӨёаҘҚаӨӨаӨ° аӨЁаӨ№аҘҖаӨӮ, аӨ¬аӨІаҘҚаӨ•аӨҝ аӨҜаӨ№ аӨ№аҘҲ аӨ•аӨҝ аӨ–аӨ°аҘҖаӨҰаӨҫаӨ°аҘҖ аӨ•аӨҝаӨёаӨЁаҘҮ аӨҶаӨ—аҘҮ аӨ¬аӨўаӨјаӨҫаӨҲаҘӨ аӨёаҘҚаӨ°аҘӢаӨӨ: coindesk.com

id.title: Bitcoin Tembus US$80.000, Didorong Leverage Bukan Pembeli Spot AS
id.excerpt: Kenaikan bitcoin terbaru di atas US$80.000 dipimpin trader berleverage, bukan pembeli spot berbasis AS, sehingga keberlanjutan reli mulai dipertanyakan.
id.body: Bitcoin baru-baru ini menembus US$80.000, tetapi data menunjukkan pergerakan itu dipimpin oleh trader berleverage, bukan pembeli spot yang berbasis di Amerika Serikat. Permintaan spot biasanya dipandang sebagai dasar yang lebih kuat bagi kenaikan harga, sedangkan reli yang digerakkan leverage menunjukkan pasar lebih bergantung pada posisi berbasis pinjaman. Karena itu, keberlanjutan breakout ini dipertanyakan. Fokusnya bukan hanya level US$80.000, melainkan siapa yang mendorong aksi beli tersebut. Sumber: coindesk.com
